Motivation: 现有基准评估（如MMLU PRO、BBH、IFEval）仅关注模型在固定测试集上的输出结果，无法反映模型如何处理信息、校准不确定性或组织内部知识。同时面临数据污染、任务范围狭窄、与现实可靠性脱节等问题。

Method: 提出LPP框架，从模型的隐藏激活和输出分布中推导任务无关的标量指标，刻画模型的潜在表征和动态特征，实现跨规模的可解释比较。

Result: 在8个LLM（0.5B-14B）上实验发现，基准分数相近的模型可能展现出截然不同的潜在特征（如熵或适应性差异），LPP能提供稳定且对架构敏感的签名。

Conclusion: 建议将LPP与基准评估结合使用，以提供更深层次、可解释的模型行为理解，支持更可靠的模型选择、安全评估和超越表层准确度的评测。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) frequently achieve impressive scores on standardized benchmarks, yet accuracy alone offers a limited view of their capabilities. Evaluating open-source LLMs through leaderboards faces persistent issues like data contamination, narrow task scope, and weak alignment with real-world reliability. Benchmark-based evaluations such as MMLU PRO, BBH, or IFEval primarily capture \textit{what} a model outputs on fixed test sets, not \textit{how} it processes information, calibrates uncertainty, or structures internal knowledge. In this article, we advocate for a shift from benchmark-centric evaluation toward a complementary, \textit{state-centered intrinsic assessment} of LLMs. To this end, we introduce \textbf{Latent Performance Profiling (LPP)} -- a framework that derives task-agnostic diagnostics from hidden activations and output distributions. LPP defines a set of scalar metrics on a model's latent representations and dynamics, revealing scale-independent traits that enable interpretable comparisons and uncover hidden vulnerabilities. Unlike static accuracy scores, LPP provides stable, architecture-sensitive signatures across models of similar size. With extensive empirical analyses across eight LLMs, spanning a size range of 0.5B-14B, we demonstrate that models with similar benchmark scores can exhibit contrasting latent profiles, such as differences in entropy or adaptability. Guided by these insights, we design synthetic probes for uncertainty and symbolic reasoning that align with intrinsic metrics while decoupling from leaderboard bias. We recommend that reporting LPP alongside benchmarks provides a deeper, interpretable understanding of model behavior, enabling more reliable model selection, safety assessment, and evaluation beyond surface-level accuracy.

</details>


### [114] [Recovering Diversity Without Losing Alignment: A DPO Recipe for Post-Trained LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30021)
*Vinay Samuel,Yapei Chang,Mohit Iyyer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: REDIPO是一种离线DPO数据构建流程，通过从基础模型和指令模型中采样响应、重写、过滤并构建偏好对，在保持对齐效果的同时恢复LLM输出的多样性。在多个模型上，NoveltyBench distinct_k提升134%、33%、44%，而MTBench等对齐指标基本保持，安全性也有提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放式指令通常有多个有效答案，但后训练（如DPO）往往将LLM的输出空间压缩到少数规范响应上，导致多样性丧失。作者希望在保持对齐收益的同时，恢复多样化的有效答案模式。

Method: REDIPO流程：（1）对每个提示，从基础模型和指令模型分别采样响应；（2）用指令模型重写基础模型的响应；（3）过滤候选响应的安全性和指令遵循质量；（4）构建偏好对：在指令遵循奖励相近的候选中，偏好边缘多样（marginally diverse）的响应。

Result: 在Qwen3-4B、OLMo-3-7B、LLaMA-3.1-8B上，NoveltyBench distinct_k分别提升134%、33%、44%；DivPO多样性变化为0%、-6%、-4%。MTBench、IFEval、Arena-Hard性能基本保持，HarmBench攻击成功率下降。

Conclusion: 通过精心构建的偏好数据，可以从基础模型的生成中重新引入多样化的有效答案，同时保持后训练的对齐收益。边缘多样性偏好选择和基础响应重写是关键驱动因素。

Abstract: Many open-ended instructions have multiple valid answers that users can benefit from seeing, but post-training often narrows an LLM's output space toward a small set of canonical responses. We introduce REDIPO, an offline DPO data-construction pipeline for recovering distinct valid answer modes while preserving the alignment benefits of the instruct model. For each prompt, REDIPO samples responses from both base and instruct models, rewrites base-model responses with the instruct model, filters candidates for safety and instruction-following quality, and builds preference pairs that favor marginally diverse responses among candidates with similar instruction-following reward. Across Qwen3-4B, OLMo-3-7B, and LLaMA-3.1-8B, REDIPO improves NoveltyBench distinct_k by 134%, 33%, and 44% relative to the instruct checkpoints, while DivPO changes diversity by 0%, -6%, and -4% on the same models. These gains largely maintain MTBench, IFEval, and Arena-Hard performance, and reduce direct-category HarmBench attack success rate. Ablations show that marginal-diversity pair selection and base-response rewriting drive the diversity gains, while filtering and quality-bounded pairing help maintain alignment. Overall, our results show that diverse valid answers from base-model generations can be reintroduced through carefully constructed preference data while retaining the alignment benefits of post-training. We release our code and data at https://github.com/vsamuel2003/RiDiPO.

</details>


### [115] [Give it Space! Explicit Disentangling of Positional and Semantic Representations in Encoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30022)
*Pierre-Antoine Lequeu,Camille Barboule,Benjamin Piwowarski*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过解耦语义、绝对位置和相对位置三个独立信息流，研究Transformer中的位置编码机制，发现绝对位置子空间会坍缩为低维流形、注意力头分化为结构和语义两类、以及标准位置编码在MLM压力下会丢失宏观结构信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有位置编码方法（如RoPE）在长上下文理解和检索任务中表现不佳，说明对Transformer内部位置信息处理机制的理解不足，需要更深入的机理研究以指导更优的位置编码设计。

Method: 修改编码器Transformer，将位置信号和语义信号解耦为三个独立信息流（语义、绝对位置AP、相对位置RP），仅对语义流施加MLM目标，从而实现对位置机制的干净机理分析。

Result: (1) 解耦的AP子空间自发坍缩为低频二维流形，捕捉文档结构；(2) 注意力头分化为结构和语义两类，RP仅支持后者；(3) 标准位置编码无法稳健保留宏观结构，RoPE和RP仅弱编码该结构，纠缠AP在最终层会丢失结构信息；解耦方法在Flash-Holmes基准的65个语言现象中改善49个。

Conclusion: 解耦的位置编码方法不仅揭示了Transformer内部位置信息处理的本质机制，还能提升语言表示质量，为设计更好的位置编码提供了理论依据和实用方案。

Abstract: Positional encoding (PE) underpins how permutation-invariant Transformers represent sequence order, yet how positional information is processed and stored remains poorly understood. Modern PE methods such as RoPE still struggle on tasks such as long-context understanding or retrieval \cite{chen-etal-2025-hope}. Hence, a better understanding of the internal positional mechanism could help design better PE. Building on evidence that positional and semantic signals occupy nearly orthogonal subspaces in trained Transformers, we modify an encoder Transformer to process three explicitly disentangled streams: semantic, absolute positional (AP) and relative positional (RP), and confine the masked-language-modeling (MLM) objective to the semantic stream. This decoupling enables a clean mechanistic study and yields three take-aways. (1) The isolated AP subspace spontaneously collapses into a low-frequency two-dimensional manifold that captures the structure of the document; (2) Attention heads specialize into structure and semantic-oriented groups, with RP exclusively supporting the latter; (3) Standard positional encodings do not robustly retain macroscopic structure: RoPE and RP only weakly encode it, and entangled AP loses it in the final layers under MLM pressure. The disentangled approach preserves positional encoding, which improves linguistic representation on 49 of the 65 linguistic phenomena of the Flash-Holmes probing benchmark.

</details>


### [116] [HEART-Bench: Do LLM Agents Exhibit Human-like Psychology?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30058)
*Weihan Peng,Chenxu Zhang,Qianao Wang,Yuling Shi,Heng Lian,Qihong Mao,Jiahao Pang,Chunliang Feng,Bowen Li,Xiaodong Gu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基准测试，用于评估LLM智能体能否基于大五人格特质和自传体记忆，在DIAMONDS情景框架下模拟出连贯、类人的心理行为决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注LLM智能体的任务能力（规划、推理、行动），忽略了情感和人格维度的重要性，缺乏系统性评估其能否模拟类人心理一致性的方法。

Method: 基于正交的大五人格特质构建11个角色，每个角色整合1000条按发展生命周期分布的自传体记忆；设计64个决策场景（基于DIAMONDS分类法），生成673道多选题来评估人格一致性。

Result: 经过系统的人工验证和筛选，最终获得包含673道多选题的基准测试集。

Conclusion: 该基准为研究LLM智能体中的类人情感、人格一致性和价值一致的行为决策提供了可扩展的测试平台。

Abstract: While LLM agents have demonstrated remarkable task-oriented abilities such as planning, reasoning, and action, few works have treated them as complete human personalities where emotional dimensions hold equal importance. In this paper, we introduce a novel benchmark to systematically assess whether LLM agents can simulate coherent, human-like psychology. Specifically, our benchmark constructs 11 diverse human characters grounded in orthogonal Big Five personality traits, with each profile deeply integrated with 1,000 structured autobiographical-style episodic memories distributed across theory-grounded developmental life stages. To rigorously evaluate the psychological manifestations of LLMs, we designed a curated suite of 64 decision-making scenarios, guided by the DIAMONDS taxonomy, a psychological framework that characterizes situations along eight dimensions: Duty, Intellect, Adversity, Mating, pOsitivity, Negativity, Deception, and Sociality. By subjecting agents to varying scenarios, the benchmark evaluates whether they can consolidate their innate personality traits and autobiographical memories to make behavioral decisions that are consistent with their specific psychological profiles. After systematic human validation and filtering, we obtained a benchmark consisting of 673 multiple-choice questions (MCQs). We believe this benchmark provides a principled and scalable testbed for studying human-like emotions, personality consistency, and value-consistent behavioural decision-making in LLM-based agents.

</details>


### [117] [UniSteer: Text-Guided Flow Matching in Activation Space for Versatile LLM Steering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30076)
*Yingdong Shi,Ruiming Zhang,Changming Li,Zhiyu Yang,Kaixing Zhang,Jingyi Yu,Kan Ren*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: UniSteer 提出了一种基于文本引导的激活流匹配模型，通过条件生成残差流激活分布，无需为每个行为单独设计干预模块，即可实现统一的行为控制、真实性引导、细粒度概念控制、多约束指令遵循及激活空间分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活控制方法依赖固定的引导方向或任务特定的干预模块，难以适应细粒度概念和组合约束，需要一种更灵活、统一的控制框架。

Method: 学习一个基于自然语言条件的通用条件速度场，在激活空间中进行流匹配；推理时通过流反转将源激活部分传输到潜在状态，再在目标文本条件下重新生成并注入回冻结的LLM中；同时支持激活空间分类（选择重构能量最低的文本标签）。

Result: 在三种目标LLM上实验，UniSteer在行为控制、真实性引导、细粒度概念控制、多约束指令遵循和激活空间分类等任务上均表现有效。

Conclusion: UniSteer提供了一个统一的接口，在不修改LLM参数的情况下，通过文本条件灵活控制多种行为，展示了激活流匹配在模型控制中的潜力。

Abstract: Activation-based control steers large language models (LLMs) by intervening on their internal representations during inference, and has emerged as an effective paradigm for controlling behaviors such as persona and style. However, existing methods often rely on fixed steering directions or task-specific intervention modules, making them difficult to adapt to fine-grained concepts and compositional constraints. We propose UniSteer, a text-guided activation flow matching model that learns a conditional distribution over residual-stream activations from natural-language conditions. Instead of fitting a separate intervention for each target behavior, UniSteer learns a universal conditional velocity field in activation space. At inference time, UniSteer performs flow inversion by partially transporting a source activation toward a latent state and regenerating it under a target textual condition before injecting it back into the frozen LLM. The same conditional model supports activation-space classification by selecting the textual label with the lowest reconstruction energy. Experiments on three target LLMs show that UniSteer provides a unified interface across behavioral control, truthfulness steering, fine-grained concept steering, multi-constraint instruction following, and activation-space classification.

</details>


### [118] [Adaptive Targeted Dynamic Chunking for Tokenization-Free Hierarchical Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30080)
*Thang Dang,Akira Nakagawa,Kenichi Kobayashi,Koichi Shirahata*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应目标动态分块（ATDC），一种用于层级架构中动态分块的字节压缩控制机制，通过课程学习渐进调整压缩比，在FineWeb-Edu 100B数据集上达到与字节级和词元级基线相当的BPB性能，并展现出更稳定的训练动态和更优的下游任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 免分词层级模型虽能解决传统LLM的预处理问题（如词汇表设计、OOV错误、语言特定约束），但字节级方法面临压缩比优化的关键挑战，压缩比直接影响模型处理字节数据的性能。

Method: 提出ATDC机制，利用课程学习在训练过程中从低压缩到高压缩渐进调整压缩比；建立目标压缩比与BPIC之间的关系，从而追踪训练过程中块大小的演化。

Result: 在FineWeb-Edu 100B数据集上，层级模型配备ATDC在BPB性能上达到与字节级和词元级基线相当的水平；相比固定压缩比模型，训练更稳定，下游任务表现更优。

Conclusion: ATDC有效提升了层级字节模型的压缩比优化能力，在保持字节级处理固有鲁棒性和灵活性的同时，实现更优的训练动态和性能表现。

Abstract: Tokenization-free hierarchical models are emerging as a promising alternative to traditional Large Language Models (LLMs), addressing inherent preprocessing issues such as vocabulary design complexity, out-of-vocabulary (OOV) errors, and language-specific constraints. However, a significant challenge in these byte-level methods is the optimization of the compression ratio, a critical factor that dictates model performance for processing bytes data via chunks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Targeted Dynamic Chunking (ATDC), a novel byte-compression control mechanism designed to enhance the effectiveness of dynamic chunking within hierarchical architectures. Our approach utilizes curriculum learning to progressively adjust the compression ratio during training, transitioning from low to high compression to stabilize the learning process. We provide an analysis establishing the relationship between the target compression ratio and Bytes-Per-Innermost-Chunk (BPIC), allowing for tracking of chunk-size evolution throughout the training phase. Evaluations conducted on the FineWeb-Edu 100B dataset demonstrate that hierarchical models equipped with ATDC achieve competitive Bits-Per-Byte (BPB) performance compared to conventional baselines operating at both byte and token levels. Furthermore, the proposed method exhibits more stable training dynamics and superior final performance across diverse downstream tasks compared to models using fixed compression ratios, while maintaining the inherent robustness and flexibility of byte-level processing.

</details>


### [119] [DirectorBench: Diagnosing Long-Form Video Generation with Personalized Multi-Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30090)
*Jiamin Chen,Qianben Chen,Jiawen Zhang,Yidi Wu,Yuchen Li,Xiaokun Zhang,Wangchunshu Zhou,Chen Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了DirectorBench，一个用于长视频生成的个性化多智能体诊断基准，通过80个结构化元数据、7个用户画像和40个检查点标准，在5个维度上评估视频质量，揭示了工作流中的过渡瓶颈和用户偏好依赖问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长视频生成评估基准主要关注局部视觉质量、短时时间一致性或通用提示对齐，无法诊断工作流故障和用户偏好差异。

Method: DirectorBench包含80个结构化元数据条目、7个用户画像、40个检查点标准，覆盖脚本、视觉、音频、跨模态和稳定性5个维度，支持检查点级瓶颈定位和画像感知评估。

Result: 4种长视频生成工作流中，过渡质量平均仅0.256（最佳0.356），而提示级用户需求满足度平均0.71；14名标注员的人类评估验证了DirectorBench与人类判断的一致性。

Conclusion: 诊断性和画像感知的基准测试对长视频生成至关重要，能够揭示聚合评分隐藏的工作流和画像依赖的失败模式。

Abstract: Long-form video generation is rapidly moving from short, single-scene synthesis toward minute-long, multi-shot creation with narrative structure, cinematic control, audio, and cross-modal synchronization. However, evaluating such videos remains challenging, since existing benchmarks largely focus on local visual quality, short-horizon temporal consistency, or generic prompt alignment, and provide limited diagnosis of workflow failures and user-dependent preferences. We introduce DirectorBench, a personalized multi-agent diagnostic benchmark for long-form video generation. DirectorBench evaluates generated videos with respect to 80 structured metadata entries, 7 user profiles, and 40 checkpoint criteria across 5 dimensions: script, visual, audio, cross-modal, and stability. Instead of reducing quality to a single aggregate score, DirectorBench localizes checkpoint-level bottlenecks and supports profile-aware evaluation. We evaluate 4 long-form video generation workflows, 6 base LLMs, and 7 user profiles. Across workflows, DirectorBench reveals a between-unit bottleneck: transition quality averages only 0.256 and reaches 0.356 for the best workflow, while prompt-level user demand fulfillment averages 0.71. We further conduct human evaluation with 14 annotators to validate the alignment between DirectorBench and human judgment. The results show that DirectorBench captures human-perceptible quality differences and reveals workflow- and profile-dependent failure modes that are hidden by aggregate scoring. These findings highlight the importance of diagnostic and profile-aware benchmarking for long-form video generation.

</details>


### [120] [SEAL: Can Saturated Benchmarks Be Revived by LLM-as-a-Meta-Judge?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30104)
*Jiamin Chen,Yidi Wu,Qiexiang Wang,Qianben Chen,Yuchen Li,Yansen Zhang,Xiaokun Zhang,Wangchunshu Zhou,Chen Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SEAL协议，通过种子淘汰赛+自适应元评判，在已有饱和基准中提取排名信号，比全配对评估效率更高（11.89次调用vs 28次），排名准确率0.83-1.00 Spearman。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言模型基准趋于饱和，顶尖系统得分接近无法区分，而构建更难的基准成本高。核心动机是能否通过改进评估方法，在现有任务输出中重新提取有意义的排名信号。

Method: SEAL（Seeded Elimination with Adaptive LLM-as-a-Meta-Judge）：将候选输出种子化后纳入单败淘汰赛，每场比赛使用任务级原则+自改进清单标准进行评估，通过自适应元评判逐步提升区分能力。

Result: 在代码生成、数学推理、知识问答、工具使用等多类饱和基准上，SEAL的Spearman相关系数达0.83-1.00，top-1一致性4/4，每次任务平均调用11.89次，远低于全配对评估的28次。

Conclusion: SEAL证明了在不构建新基准的情况下，通过改进评估协议就能在饱和基准中提取有效排名信号，在排名准确性与延迟之间取得更优的权衡。

Abstract: Widely used language-model benchmarks are increasingly saturated, with frontier systems often receiving near-tied scores that standard metrics cannot resolve. Rather than constructing harder alternatives, we ask whether existing tasks can be made informative again through improved evaluation over the same candidate outputs. Therefore, we present Seeded Elimination with Adaptive LLM-as-a-Meta-Judge, a self-improving evaluation protocol for extracting latent ranking signal from saturated benchmarks. SEAL seeds candidate outputs into a single elimination and evaluates each match with task-level principles plus self-improving checklist criteria. We evaluate SEAL on multiple saturated benchmarks covering code generation, mathematical reasoning, knowledge-intensive question answering, and tool-use agent task completion. Across these settings, SEAL improves the ranking-accuracy--latency trade-off over competing protocols, attaining 0.83--1.00 Spearman agreement with full pairwise judging and 4/4 top-1 agreement, while requiring only 11.89 calls per task compared with 28.00 for full pairwise evaluation.

</details>


### [121] [Dial HEALTHDIAL for Advice: A Multilingual and Multi-Parallel Spoken Dialogue Dataset for Knowledge-Grounded Information Seeking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30107)
*Songbo Hu,Yinhong Liu,Ej Zhou,Evgeniia Razumovskaia,Xiaobin Wang,Alexander Fraser,Ivan Vulić,Anna Korhonen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: HEALTHDIAL是一个大规模、多语言、多并行的口语对话数据集，包含6,000个信息寻求对话和163小时用户语音，覆盖WHO四种官方语言，用于开发和评估基于RAG的口语对话系统，并揭示了不同语言间的性能差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建口语对话数据集在方法论上具有挑战性，当目标是大规模构建多语言、多并行数据集时挑战更加突出。现有资源难以支持多语言RAG口语对话系统的开发与评估。

Method: 创建了包含6,000个信息寻求对话（每种语言1,500个）的数据集，对话基于WHO可信内容，记录了来自四种WHO官方语言（阿拉伯语、中文、英语、西班牙语）的163小时用户语音，并对每位说话者标注了人口统计学和社会语言学变量。

Result: 基准测试显示各语言间存在一致性的性能差异，即使在高资源语言之间也是如此。发布了数据集、原型系统及数据收集与评估工具包。

Conclusion: HEALTHDIAL数据集为多语言RAG口语对话系统的研究提供了重要资源，揭示了跨语言性能差距，对推动多语言对话AI的公平性和包容性有重要意义。

Abstract: Creating spoken dialogue datasets is methodologically challenging, and these challenges are amplified when the goal is to build multilingual, multi-parallel datasets at scale. This work introduces HEALTHDIAL, a large-scale, multilingual, and multi-parallel dataset for developing and evaluating retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)-based spoken dialogue systems. The dataset comprises 6,000 information-seeking dialogues (1,500 per language) grounded in trusted content from the World Health Organization (WHO) and 163 hours of user speech recorded from native speakers of diverse dialects across four official WHO languages: Arabic, Chinese, English, and Spanish. Each speaker is annotated with demographic (e.g., gender, age) and sociolinguistic (e.g., primary language, region of origin) variables. We report benchmark results across key dialogue tasks, which reveal consistent performance disparities across languages, even among high-resource ones. To support future research, we release the dataset, a prototype system, and a toolkit for data collection and system evaluation.

</details>


### [122] [CCS: Clinical Consensus Selection for Radiology Report Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30131)
*Xi Zhang,Yingshu Li,Zaiqiao Meng,Jake Lever,Edmond S. L. Ho*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出临床共识选择（CCS）框架，通过采样多个候选报告并选择临床共识最高的报告，在推理阶段提升放射学报告生成质量，无需重新训练模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有放射学报告生成（RRG）大多关注训练阶段扩展，而推理阶段决策未被充分探索。作者发现固定模型生成的候选池中常包含比默认解码结果更优的报告，说明推理时选择是性能瓶颈。

Method: CCS是一个与解码器无关的推理时选择框架：对同一输入采样多个候选报告，利用文本效用与放射学适配效用（基于图像-报告多模态嵌入器计算）综合评估候选报告间的临床共识，选择共识最高的报告作为最终输出。

Result: 在三个数据集和多个放射学MLLM上，CCS一致优于单路径解码和通用Best-of-N基线，尤其在临床指标上提升显著。进一步分析表明，图像驱动的效用与文本共识构成不同的选择维度，推理时改进仍有较大空间。

Conclusion: 推理时选择是提升RRG质量的有效且被低估的方向，CCS通过多候选临床共识选择可显著提升报告临床质量，且易集成到现有系统中。

Abstract: Radiology report generation (RRG) is commonly formulated as a single-path generation task, where a multimodal large language model (MLLM) produces one decoded report as the final output. While recent progress has largely been driven by scaling training data, model capacity, and retrieval mechanisms, improving report quality at inference time remains underexplored. In this work, we observe that fixed radiology MLLMs often generate clinically stronger reports elsewhere in their candidate pool than the one selected by default decoding, suggesting that inference-time decision making remains an overlooked bottleneck. To address this, we propose Clinical Consensus Selection (CCS), a decoder-agnostic inference-time selection framework that samples multiple candidate reports and selects the one with the highest clinical consensus across the rollout pool. CCS unifies text-based utilities with a radiology-adapted utility computed by an image--report-trained multimodal embedder, which measures candidate agreement beyond surface-level textual similarity. Across three datasets and multiple radiology MLLMs, CCS consistently improves inference-time performance over single-path decoding and generic Best-of-N baselines, with particularly clear gains on clinical metrics. Further analysis shows that image-grounded utility forms a selection axis distinct from textual consensus and that substantial headroom remains for improving RRG at inference time.

</details>


### [123] [CorPipe at CRAC 2026: Empty Nodes and Cross-Lingual Transfer in Multilingual Coreference Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30133)
*Milan Straka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CorPipe 26 是 CRAC 2026 多语言指代消解共享任务中的获胜系统，通过改进单一模型预测空节点、提及和指代链接，在LLM赛道超越其他系统2.8个百分点，在无约束赛道超越9.5个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CRAC 2026共享任务第五版主要关注生成式大语言模型与专门系统的比较，并引入了5个新数据集和2种新语言，亟需一个高效的多语言指代消解系统。

Method: 在CorPipe 25基础上改进，提出新变体：在单一模型中同时预测空节点、提及和指代链接。进行了不同模型规模、空节点预测方法和跨语言零样本评估的消融实验。

Result: 在LLM赛道超越所有其他提交2.8个百分点，在无约束赛道超越所有提交9.5个百分点。

Conclusion: CorPipe 26证明了专门系统在多语言指代消解任务上仍显著优于生成式LLM，且单一模型联合预测空节点、提及和链接是有效策略。代码和模型已开源。

Abstract: We introduce CorPipe 26, our winning submission to the CRAC 2026 Shared Task on Multilingual Coreference Resolution. The fifth edition of this shared task focuses mainly on the comparison of generative LLMs and specialized systems; additionally, 5 more datasets and 2 new languages are introduced. CorPipe 26 is an improved version of CorPipe 25, with a new variant predicting empty nodes together with mentions and coreference links in a single model. Our system outperforms all other submissions in the LLM track by 2.8 percent points and all submissions in the unconstrained track by 9.5 percent points. Furthermore, we perform a series of ablation experiments with different model sizes, empty node prediction methods, and cross-lingual zero-shot evaluation. The source code and the trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/ufal/crac2026-corpipe.

</details>


### [124] [Do Proactive Agents Really Need an LLM to Decide When to Wake and What to Anchor?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30152)
*Xiaoze Liu,Ruowang Zhang,Amir H. Abdi,Michel Galley,Zhikai Chen,Siheng Xiong,Xiaoqian Wang,Jing Gao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出使用时态图学习（TGL）模型替代LLM作为事件触发编码器，将用户活动流作为图结构处理而非文本，仅在触发时调用LLM生成自然语言响应。TGL在14个基线上平均F1提升16.7，速度比LLM触发方案快4-83倍，内存占用仅约220 MiB。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统主动代理将用户活动转为文本并依赖LLM处理每个事件，但用户活动本质是结构化事件流（actor, verb, object, timestamp元组），操作系统已经以图形式维护。将结构渲染为文本再让LLM恢复是多余的往返过程，导致效率低下。

Method: 将始终在线的信号视为图更新而非文本，使用小型时态图学习（TGL）模型作为编码器，一次前向传播即可生成每个事件的触发概率和每个实体的路由分数。仅在触发条件满足时才调用下游LLM代理，将小型结构化信息转化为流畅的用户面向句子。

Result: TGL在14个基线上平均F1提升16.7（最高达46.0）；在触发架构比较中，单个TGL检查点获得最强触发AUC和最稳定的部署阈值。运行速度：GPU服务器11.13ms/事件，消费级笔记本13.99ms/事件，比LLM作为触发器的配置分别快4-7倍和12-83倍，BF16驻留内存约220 MiB。

Conclusion: TGL方案在性能、速度和资源消耗上全面优于传统LLM-as-trigger方案，且可部署在设备端处理隐私敏感的用户活动流，为主动代理的触发机制提供了高效、轻量的解决方案。

Abstract: Proactive agents read user activity as text and call an LLM on every event to decide whether to act. But user activity is not natively text: it is a structured event stream of (actor, verb, object, timestamp) tuples that the operating system already maintains in graph form. Rendering the structure as text and asking an LLM to recover it is a round-trip the system never had to take. We treat the always-on signal as graph updates rather than text and use a small temporal-graph-learning (TGL) model as the encoder: one forward pass yields a per-event trigger probability and a per-entity routing score, and only the downstream agent (turning a small structured handoff into a fluent user-facing sentence) is an LLM call, invoked only when the trigger fires. TGL improves F1 on each of 14 backbones (mean +16.7, up to +46.0); in trigger-architecture comparisons, one TGL checkpoint gives the strongest trigger AUCs and the most stable deployed threshold. It runs at 11.13 ms per event on a GPU server and 13.99 ms on a consumer laptop, approximately 4--7x and 12--83x faster than every single-forward LLM-as-trigger configuration tested in each regime, with an approximately 220 MiB BF16 resident footprint deployable on-device alongside the privacy-sensitive activity stream it consumes.

</details>


### [125] [A Dual-Path Architecture for Scaling Compute and Capacity in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30202)
*Markus Frey,Behzad Shomali,Joachim Koehler,Mehdi Ali*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种双路径变换器模块，通过并行组合深层（共享参数重复K次）和宽层（单次大FFN），并利用逐token门控机制灵活分配计算和容量，在相同FLOPs下超越基线模型且参数量更少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 循环变换器在固定FLOPs下容量严格低于基线模型，需要在计算可扩展性与模型容量之间寻找更好的平衡。

Method: 设计双路径模块：深层子层（共享参数重复K次）提供顺序计算深度，宽层子层（大FFN）提供单步容量；通过逐token门控独立控制两条路径的贡献。

Result: 在两个FLOP预算下，双路径模型在语言建模和下游评测中超越等FLOP基线模型，且参数量更少；门控权重可解释，显示功能词和词汇内容偏向宽路径，标点、符号和算术token偏向深路径。

Conclusion: 双路径设计有效解耦了计算深度与容量，提升了参数效率，同时门控机制提供了可解释的token级路由分析能力。

Abstract: Looped transformers apply a shared block multiple times and have emerged as a parameter-efficient route to scaling compute in language models. However, at fixed FLOPs a looped model has strictly less capacity than a baseline transformer. We propose a novel dual-path block that can flexibly scale compute, the number of sequential operations applied to a hidden state, and capacity, the parameters available at a single step. For this we expose both axes as parallel pathways within a single layer: a deep sublayer re-applied K times with shared parameters, and a wide sublayer with an enlarged feed-forward network applied once. Independent per-token gates combine both axes and allow detailed per-token routing analyses. We show that across two FLOP budgets, our dual-path model surpasses iso-FLOP matched models on language modeling and downstream evaluations, while using fewer parameters than the baseline at matched FLOPs. The learned gates are directly interpretable and show systematic per-token allocation with function words and lexical content trend wide, while punctuation, symbols, and arithmetic tokens trend deep.

</details>


### [126] [GRUFF: LLM Pronoun Fidelity, Reasoning, and Biases in German](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30214)
*Fabian Mewes,Anne Lauscher,Vagrant Gautam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了德语代词忠实度数据集GRUFF，发现大语言模型在无上下文时对阳性/阴性名词表现良好，但对新代词（xier/en）表现不佳；编码器模型在德语中比英语更稳健，体现了语法性别的重要性；职业刻板印象在不同语法格和模型间相关性较低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代词忠实度研究主要针对英语（语法性别受限），缺乏对具有复杂语法性别系统的德语等语言的系统研究，也缺乏对非二元性别人称代词（neopronouns）的评估。

Method: 构建GRUFF数据集，覆盖德语中四种名词性别一致系统（阳性、阴性、中性、新代词xier/en）和四套代词系统，通过干扰项（distractor）设置评估模型的代词忠实度及对职业刻板印象的敏感性。

Result: 1) LLMs对阳性/阴性名词的语法一致性表现良好，但对新代词xier/en表现不佳；2) 模型普遍易受干扰项影响，但编码器模型在德语中比英语更鲁棒；3) 职业刻板印象在不同语法格和大多数模型间相关性低，仅架构相近的模型表现出较高相关性。

Conclusion: 语法性别在代词回指推理中起重要作用，但现有模型对包容性语言（新代词）的支持不足；跨格和跨模型的刻板印象不一致性提示需要更多关注去偏方法的泛化能力。

Abstract: Third-person singular pronouns have long been used to study stereotypical biases in language models and to test their abilities to reason about reference. More recently, the interplay between reasoning and bias has been investigated with the task of pronoun fidelity, which assesses models' abilities to correctly reuse a previously-specified pronoun for a discourse entity, independent of other potentially distracting discourse entities mentioned in between. However, such research focuses on English, which is a language with limited grammatical gender and almost no gender agreement. In this paper we contribute a novel, large-scale dataset, GRUFF, to measure pronoun fidelity in German, covering four different gender agreement systems in nouns, and four sets of pronouns. With this dataset, we show that LLMs show strong grammatical agreement for masculine and feminine entities in the absence of explicit context, but not for neopronouns xier and en. Models are generally not robust to distractors, but encoder-only models are more robust in German than in English, reflecting the importance of grammatical gender. Finally, we show that occupational stereotypes in this context are poorly correlated across grammatical cases, and across most models, except ones with closely related architectures. We release all code and data to encourage further work on gender-inclusive language and referential reasoning in German.

</details>


### [127] [Do Language Models Track Entities Across State Changes?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30233)
*Zilu Tang,Qiao Zhao,Gabriel Franco,Derry Wijaya,Aaron Mueller,Sebastian Schuster,Najoung Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探究了Transformer语言模型如何解决具有多个状态变化操作的实体追踪问题。研究发现，LM并非逐步追踪状态变化，而是在查询明确时，于最后一个token处并行聚合相关信息。特别地，LM通过一种全局抑制标签实现REMOVE操作，该机制脆弱且可预测多种失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注无状态变化的实体绑定，但对LM如何处理自然语言中具有多个状态变化操作的复杂实体追踪问题理解有限，因此作者希望系统性地探究这一机制。

Method: 通过行为实验和机制分析相结合的方式，研究LM在复杂实体追踪场景下的内部机制。特别分析了三种基本操作（PUT、REMOVE、MOVE）的实现方式，并识别出REMOVE操作依赖一种全局抑制标签机制。

Result: 1) LM不是逐步增量式追踪状态，而是在查询出现时在最后一个token处并行聚合信息；2) REMOVE操作通过全局抑制标签实现，该机制脆弱；3) 该全局抑制机制可预测多种失败模式，并通过行为实验验证。

Conclusion: LM以一种非序列的策略解决本质上是序列性的任务。行为分析和机制分析可以相互促进：行为结果启发机制假设，机制分析帮助构建更强的行为评估并预测现有评估中的失败模式。

Abstract: Entity tracking (ET), the ability to keep track of states, is a fundamental skill that underlies complex reasoning. An increasing amount of work investigates how transformer language models (LMs) solve entity binding $\textit{without}$ state changes. However, there is limited understanding of how non-toy LMs address ET problems of realistic difficulties expressed in natural language. To this end, we investigate the mechanisms underlying ET in more complex scenarios featuring multiple state-changing operations. We find that LMs do not incrementally track world states across tokens or query-relevant states across layers, but simply aggregate relevant information in parallel at the last token when the query becomes evident. We further investigate mechanisms of individual operations ($\texttt{PUT}$, $\texttt{REMOVE}$, $\texttt{MOVE}$) to characterize this non-incremental ET mechanism. Surprisingly, LMs implement the $\texttt{REMOVE}$ operation with a fragile global suppression tag; this global removal mechanism predicts various failure modes that we confirm behaviorally. We provide a mechanistic solution of nullifying this tag to partially address this issue. Overall, our findings reveal that LMs solve a fundamentally sequential task using a non-sequential strategy. More broadly, our work illustrates how behavioral and mechanistic analyses can fruitfully interact. Behavioral results inform mechanistic hypotheses, and insights from mechanistic analyses help build stronger behavioral evaluations by predicting failure modes missing from existing evaluations.

</details>


### [128] [Knowing What to Solve Before How: Preplan Empowered LLM Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30245)
*Shaojie Wang,Liang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PPC框架在传统"问题→计划→推理链"范式基础上，增加了显式的"预计划"阶段（问题理解），通过三阶段合成管道和复合GRPO奖励来保证预计划的完整性，在4个骨干模型和5个数学推理基准上取得39/40指标最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于计划的推理方法（question→plan→cot）存在范式层面的缺陷：计划和执行阶段处理的是"如何解决"问题，但"解决什么"——即识别问题类型、适用工具和潜在陷阱——仍然完全隐式化，缺乏显式的问题理解阶段。

Method: 提出PPC框架，包含：(1) 三阶段合成管道，配合spoiler-score检测器过滤泄漏和spoiler失败，构建干净的预计划监督数据；(2) 复合GRPO奖励机制，强制生成的计划确实基于预计划；(3) 形成question→preplan→plan→cot的新范式。

Result: 在4种骨干模型和5个数学推理基准上，PPC在40个评估指标中取得39个最优，maj@16和pass@16分别比最强基线提升+2.23和+3.06，且不增加额外推理token开销。

Conclusion: 引入显式的问题理解阶段（预计划）能够有效弥补现有计划推理范式的结构性缺陷，在提升推理性能的同时保持推理效率。

Abstract: Current plan-based reasoning methods improve large language models (LLMs) by inserting a planning stage before execution, giving rise to the question $\rightarrow$ plan $\rightarrow$ cot paradigm. While effective, a closer examination reveals an inherent paradigm-level gap: both the planning and its execution stages decide how to solve a problem, while the prior question of what to solve; recognizing the problem type, the applicable tools, and the foreseeable pitfalls; remains entirely implicit. To bridge this gap, we propose PPC (Preplan-Plan-CoT), a framework that introduces an explicit problem-understanding stage, the preplan, yielding a new question $\rightarrow$ preplan $\rightarrow$ plan $\rightarrow$ cot paradigm. Realizing this paradigm requires safeguarding the conceptual integrity of preplan at both ends. Specifically, we design a three-stage synthesis pipeline with a spoiler-score detector that filters out leakage and spoiler failures to build clean preplan supervision, and a composite GRPO reward enforces that the generated plan genuinely follows from the preplan. Experiments across four backbones and five mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that PPC achieves the best results on 39 of 40 metrics, improving maj@16 and pass@16 by +2.23 and +3.06 over the strongest baseline without introducing additional inference token overhead.

</details>


### [129] [Same Evidence, Different Answers: Canonical-Context On-Policy Distillation for Multi-Turn Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30251)
*Zizhuo Lin,Quanling Liu,Jinsheng Quan,Chao Zhang,Yifan Zhu,Xing Shi,Jingtao Xu,Zhihui Li,Yawei Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种名为CCOPD的训练方法，通过在对话训练中让模型对齐完整上下文下的表现，来减轻LLM在多轮信息逐步呈现时出现的"自我锚定漂移"问题，在数学任务上平均提升32%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在单轮完整提示下能很好地完成任务，但当相同信息在多轮对话中逐步呈现时，模型表现显著下降。作者认为关键原因是"自我锚定漂移"——模型在部分信息下生成的回复会引入未经证实的不合理假设，这些假设随后会扭曲最终答案。

Method: 提出Canonical-Context On-Policy Distillation (CCOPD)。训练中使用同一基座模型扮演两个角色：冻结的教师模型接收完整FULL prompt，可训练的学生模型通过多轮对话逐步接收相同信息。CCOPD通过蒸馏将学生在自身轨迹上的行为与教师的标准全上下文行为对齐。

Result: 仅在数学对话上训练后，CCOPD在RAW-SHARDED任务上相比原始基座模型平均提升32%，覆盖数学和五个零样本跨域任务族，同时基本保持了全上下文性能。

Conclusion: 进一步分析表明，CCOPD增强了模型对用户证据的依赖，降低了对之前助理解答中污染信息的敏感度，有效缓解了自我锚定漂移问题。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often solve a task when all instructions are given in a single prompt, but fail when the same information is revealed gradually across turns. When a clean FULL prompt and a RAW-SHARDED conversation contain the same complete user evidence, the model should still arrive at the same answer. We argue that a key reason for this gap is self-anchored drift: responses produced under partial information introduce unsupported assumptions, and those assumptions later distort the final answer. To reduce this effect, we propose Canonical-Context On-Policy Distillation (CCOPD). During training, the same base model is used in two roles: a frozen teacher conditioned on the clean FULL prompt and a trainable student that receives the same evidence incrementally through a multi-turn conversation; CCOPD aligns the student's behavior on its own trajectories with the teacher's canonical full-context behavior. Trained only on math problem conversations, CCOPD yields a 32\% average relative improvement in RAW-SHARDED performance over the original base model across math and five zero-shot out-of-domain task families, while largely preserving full-context performance. Further analyses suggest that CCOPD strengthens grounding in user evidence and reduces sensitivity to contamination from earlier assistant turns.

</details>


### [130] [How LoRA Remembers? A Parametric Memory Law for LLM Finetuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30260)
*Ziwen Xu,Haiwen Hong,Linsong Yu,Benglei Cui,Longtao Huang,Hui Xue,Ningyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过LoRA探究LLM的参数量化记忆能力，提出参数量记忆定律（幂律关系），发现预测概率p>0.5是贪婪解码下逐字回忆的充分条件，并据此提出MemFT优化策略提升记忆效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM知识更新研究（如LoRA）多依赖定性下游评估，缺乏对精确参数量化记忆的容量极限和底层动力学的定量理解。

Method: 1) 将LoRA作为可控记忆容量探针，在潜在空间中系统量化精确参数量化记忆；2) 提出参数量记忆定律（Parametric Memory Law），建立损失降低ΔL与有效参数及序列长度间的幂律关系；3) 在token级别进行细粒度分析，发现预测概率p>0.5是贪婪解码下逐字回忆的确定性相变条件；4) 提出MemFT，一种阈值引导的优化策略，动态将训练预算重新分配给低于阈值的token。

Result: 1) 确立了参数量记忆定律（幂律关系）；2) 发现了token级别预测概率p>0.5的确定性相变现象；3) MemFT能有效提升记忆保真度和效率。

Conclusion: 本文填补了LLM精确参数量化记忆定量分析的空白，提出的MemFT为高效知识更新提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) must continuously learn and update knowledge to remain effective in dynamic real-world environments. While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is widely used for such memory updates, existing studies mainly rely on qualitative downstream evaluations, leaving the quantitative capacity limits and underlying dynamics of exact parametric memory largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we employ LoRA as a controlled memory capacity probe within the latent space to systematically quantify exact parametric memory. We introduce the Parametric Memory Law, a robust power law linking loss reduction Delta L to effective parameters and sequence length. At the token level, fine-grained analysis reveals a deterministic phase transition, demonstrating that a prediction probability of p > 0.5 constitutes a sufficient condition for verbatim recall under greedy decoding. Driven by these insights, we introduce MemFT, a threshold-guided optimization strategy that dynamically redistributes the training budget toward sub-threshold tokens. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that MemFT can enhance memory fidelity and efficiency. Code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/ParametricMemoryLaw.

</details>


### [131] [Loong: A Human-Like Long Document Translation Agent with Observe-and-Act Adaptive Context Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30274)
*Yutong Wang,Xuebo Liu,Derek F. Wong,Zhilin Li,Rongqing Jiang,Min Zhang,Shimin Tao,Daimeng Wei,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Loong——一种类人长文档翻译智能体，通过3E记忆模块（精华-范例-实体）和强化学习优化上下文策略，在英⇄中/德/法翻译中平均提升13.0分，展现强泛化性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在处理文档级翻译时面临两大矛盾：有限的上下文窗口妨碍全局连贯性，而冗余的上下文信息又降低翻译质量。现有方法缺乏主动筛选和利用最优历史信息的能力。

Method: 提出Loong智能体，核心是3E记忆模块（Essence-Exemplar-Entity），分别存储摘要、句对和实体记录。通过深度推理自适应识别最优上下文，并利用自身采样的观察-行动推理轨迹生成偏好数据，通过强化学习优化上下文选择策略。

Result: 在英⇄中/德/法三个翻译方向上，Loong在三个评估指标上平均提升13.0分，展现出强大的跨领域泛化能力和对上下文噪声的鲁棒性，在超长文档翻译中表现稳定。

Conclusion: Loong通过智能体式上下文筛选与强化学习优化，有效解决了长文档翻译中的全局连贯性和信息冗余问题，为文档级机器翻译提供了一种类人化、高效的新范式。

Abstract: Document-level translation remains one of the most challenging tasks for large language models, which are constrained by limited context windows that impede global cohesion, while simultaneously suffering from redundant contextual information that degrades translation quality. To address this, we propose a human-like long document translation agent called Loong, which leverages a 3E memory module (Essence-Exemplar-Entity) to store summaries, sentence pairs, and entity records as historical context. Instead of passively attending to all history, Loong performs deep reasoning to adaptively identify the optimal context for translation guidance. Loong optimizes its context policy through reinforcement learning, utilizing preference data derived from its own sampled observe-and-act reasoning trajectories. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that Loong achieves substantial translation quality improvements in English $\Leftrightarrow$ Chinese, German, and French directions, with average gains of up to 13.0 points across the three evaluation metrics. Furthermore, Loong exhibits strong generalization across domains and robustness against contextual noise, while maintaining remarkable stability in ultra-long document translation. Our code is released at https://github.com/YutongWang1216/LoongDocMT.

</details>


### [132] [MedCase-Structured: A Text-to-FHIR Dataset for Benchmarking Diagnostic Reasoning in Clinically Realistic EHR Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30295)
*Valentina Bui Muti,Eugénie Dulout,Ziquan Fu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种从非结构化文本生成符合临床标准的HL7 FHIR R4数据管線，构建了MedCase-Structured数据集，发现LLMs在结构化FHIR输入上的诊断准确率显著低于纯文本，强调了部署对齐基准测试的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM临床评估多基于静态数据集或非结构化输入，无法反映真实临床系统中使用的结构化、可互操作数据格式，缺乏与电子健康记录对齐的评估基准。

Method: 提出分阶段LLM生成结合术语验证与修复的管線，将非结构化文本转换为HL7 FHIR R4数据包，并构建MedCase-Structured合成数据集。

Result: 82.5%的案例生成了有效的FHIR数据；LLMs在结构化FHIR输入上的诊断准确率始终低于纯文本输入。

Conclusion: 临床AI评估需要匹配真实部署的数据格式，结构化FHIR输入对LLM构成额外挑战，未来基准测试应更贴近实际临床工作流。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show promise for clinical reasoning and decision support, but evaluation in realistic, electronic health record-congruent settings remains limited. Existing benchmarks often rely on static datasets or unstructured inputs that do not reflect the structured, interoperable data formats used in clinical systems. We introduce a pipeline for generating clinically realistic HL7 FHIR R4 bundles from unstructured text, enabling controllable evaluation of clinical decision support systems. The pipeline combines staged LLM generation with terminology-grounded validation and repair to reduce hallucinated codes and enforce structural and semantic consistency. Applying this approach to MedCaseReasoning, we construct MedCase-Structured, a synthetic dataset aligned with clinician-authored diagnostic cases, achieving valid FHIR generation for 82.5% of cases. Evaluation on MedCase-Structured reveals consistently lower diagnostic accuracy for LLMs on structured FHIR inputs than with plain text, highlighting the importance of deployment-aligned benchmarking.

</details>


### [133] [Resolution Diagnostics for Paired LLM Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30315)
*Anany Kotawala*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现两个公开LLM排行榜中许多成对排名在统计检验上未达到分辨率目标，并提出了基于假设检验的成对评估框架及诊断指标q=N/N*，揭示了未配对效应量计算方法在相近比较场景下存在约两倍的偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM排行榜的成对排名比较缺乏统计分辨率检验，用户可能基于不可靠的排名差异做出错误判断。

Method: 将成对LLM评估形式化为假设检验问题，基于功效分析推导所需样本量N*，定义分辨率比q=N/N*作为诊断指标，并通过小效应量展开分析未配对方法（Cohen h + (1-rho)）的偏差。

Result: Open LLM Leaderboard v1中11/40的成对比较和MMLU-Pro中4/9的相邻排名对在(alpha=0.05, power=0.8)下未达分辨率目标；考虑聚类后MMLU-Pro增至6/9；未配对方法的N*偏差约为两倍。

Conclusion: LLM排行榜应报告统计分辨率指标，未配对效应量计算在相近模型比较时不可靠，需采用配对检验设计。

Abstract: Across two public LLM leaderboards, many displayed pairwise rankings do not meet a conventional paired-test resolution target under the actual paired evaluation design: 11 of 40 Open LLM Leaderboard v1 pairwise comparisons and 4 of 9 MMLU-Pro top-10 adjacent-rank pairs are unresolved at (alpha, 1-beta) = (0.05, 0.8). The MMLU-Pro count rises to 6/9 under real subject-level clustering and stays at 5-6 out of 9 in 99.9% of category-bootstrap resamples. We frame paired LLM evaluation as a hypothesis-testing problem, invert level-alpha, power-(1-beta) tests, and report a per-pair resolution ratio q = N/N* as the primary diagnostic. A sharp small-effect expansion with an explicit second-order constant shows that the widely-used unpaired Cohen-h-plus-(1-rho) shortcut deviates from the correct N* by approximately a factor of two in the close-comparison regime, a deficit that three of five off-the-shelf calculators(Cohen 1988, G*Power, R pwr) silently inherit when the user post-multiplies their per-arm output by (1-rho). The unresolved-pair pattern remains under multiplicity correction and anytime-valid sequential testing.

</details>


### [134] [COMPOSE: Composing Future Theorems from Citations and Formal Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30333)
*David Busbib,Michael Werman*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出COMPOSE框架，通过结合科学引文图和形式化定理依赖图来生成未来数学定理类声明，实验表明该方法优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅建模科学引文或形式化依赖之一，导致生成的数学声明要么缺乏实证基础，要么动机不足。需要同时利用这两种互补的上下文来源。

Method: 提出COMPOSE双图框架，将语言模型条件化在科学引文上下文和形式化定理结构上。构建了arXiv-Mathlib配对的108K数据集，以及47K未来论文基准。

Result: COMPOSE在真实未来论文检索任务上优于强基线，在LLM裁判评估下取得最佳整体性能，生成更接地气且数学上更丰富的输出。

Conclusion: 未来数学声明生成受益于结合科学上下文与形式化结构，双图范式是有效途径。

Abstract: A plausible future mathematical claim must satisfy two constraints: it should follow the direction of prior work and respect the formal dependencies that constrain what can validly follow. Existing approaches typically model only one of these sources, producing claims that are either weakly grounded or insufficiently motivated. We introduce grounded future mathematical generation, where the goal is to generate a plausible future theorem-like claim for an anchor paper using two complementary sources of context: its scientific citation graph and aligned formal theorem dependency graph. To address this setting, we propose COMPOSE, a dual-graph framework that conditions a language model on both scientific citation context and formal theorem structure. To support this setting, we construct a dataset of 108K paired scientific-formal graph examples from arXiv and Mathlib, together with a benchmark of 47K future papers from 2024--2025. Experiments show that COMPOSE outperforms strong baselines on retrieval to real future papers and achieves the best overall performance under LLM-judge evaluation, producing more grounded and mathematically richer outputs. These results show that future mathematical generation benefits from combining scientific context with formal structure. Project page is available at https://david-busbib.github.io/COMPOSE-page/.

</details>


### [135] [Unlocking the Working Memory of Large Language Models for Latent Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30343)
*Lukas Aichberger,Sepp Hochreiter*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种名为RiM（Reasoning in Memory）的潜在推理方法，用固定的记忆块（特殊token序列）取代逐步推理的显式生成，使LLM能在单次前向传播中完成内部推理，避免自回归生成与外部通信的耦合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM的test-time推理通过自回归生成中间token来提升推理能力，但这将内部计算与外部通信混为一谈。受人类工作记忆启发，作者希望让LLM具备内部信息操作能力，无需外部化中间思考过程。

Method: RiM使用固定记忆块（特殊token序列）解锁LLM的工作记忆。采用两阶段课程训练：第一阶段用记忆块后的显式推理步骤进行监督学习；第二阶段丢弃逐步监督，仅根据最终答案进行迭代优化。

Result: 在多个推理基准上，RiM在不同规模和家族的LLM上达到或超越现有潜在推理方法，同时避免了自回归生成思维链的开销。

Conclusion: 大型语言模型可以通过训练使用工作记忆作为有效的潜在推理机制，在单次前向传播中完成推理，实现计算效率与推理能力的平衡。

Abstract: To improve the reasoning capabilities of large language models, test-time compute is typically scaled by generating intermediate tokens before the final answer. However, this couples reasoning to autoregressive generation and thereby conflates internal computation with external communication. In contrast, human cognition can use working memory to hold and manipulate information internally without the need to externalize intermediate thoughts. Drawing on this principle, we introduce Reasoning in Memory (RiM), a latent reasoning method that replaces the autoregressive generation of reasoning steps with memory blocks. These memory blocks are fixed sequences of special tokens that unlock the working-memory capacity of large language models. Since they are fixed rather than generated, they can be processed in a single forward pass, enabling compute-efficient latent reasoning. To operationalize these memory blocks, we employ a two-stage curriculum. First, we ground them by predicting explicit reasoning steps after each memory block. Second, we discard this step-level supervision and iteratively refine the final answer after each memory block. Our experiments on reasoning benchmarks show that, across language models of different families and sizes, RiM matches or exceeds existing latent reasoning methods while avoiding the autoregressive generation of thoughts. These results demonstrate that large language models can be trained to use working memory as an effective mechanism for latent reasoning.

</details>


### [136] [LLMSurgeon: Diagnosing Data Mixture of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30348)
*Yaxin Luo,Jiacheng Cui,Xiaohan Zhao,Xinyi Shang,Jiacheng Liu,Xinyue Bi,Zhaoyi Li,Zhiqiang Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出数据混合手术（DMS）方法，仅通过目标LLM生成的文本，就能估计其预训练语料的领域分布。作者提出LLMSurgeon框架，通过软混淆矩阵和约束逆问题来恢复潜在的混合先验，并构建了LLMScan评估套件进行验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM的预训练数据混合构成其"数字DNA"，但这一组成很少公开，导致事后审计数据组合或来源变得困难。

Method: 将DMS建模为标签偏移假设下的逆问题，通过估计校准的软混淆矩阵并求解约束逆问题来纠正系统性的领域混淆，从而恢复潜在的混合先验。

Result: 在LLMScan评估套件上，LLMSurgeon在固定协议下以高保真度恢复了领域混合分布。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一种实用的、事后审计基础模型"数字DNA"的方法，无需访问其训练数据。

Abstract: The pretraining data mixture of Large Language Models (LLMs) constitutes their "digital DNA", shaping model behaviors, capabilities, and failure modes. Yet this composition is rarely disclosed, making post-hoc auditing of data combination or provenance difficult. In this work, we formalize $\textbf{Data Mixture Surgery (DMS)}$: given only generated text from a target LLM, estimate the domain-level distribution of its pretraining corpus under a predefined taxonomy. We propose $\textbf{LLMSurgeon}$, a strong framework that casts DMS as an inverse problem under the label-shift assumption. Rather than directly aggregating classifier outputs, LLMSurgeon estimates a calibrated $\textit{soft}$ confusion matrix and solves a constrained inverse problem to correct systematic domain confusion and recover the latent mixture prior. To evaluate, we introduce $\textbf{LLMScan}$, a recipe-verifiable evaluation suite built from open-source LLMs with transparent pretraining mixtures. Across LLMScan, LLMSurgeon recovers domain mixtures with high fidelity under fixed protocols. Our work presents a practical, post-hoc approach for auditing the digital DNA of foundation models without access to their training data.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.CP'></div>

# q-fin.CP [[Back]](#toc)

### [137] [Implying Volatility: How Fast Can We Go?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29102)
*Fabien Le Floc'h,Jherek Healy*

Main category: q-fin.CP

TL;DR: FlashIV是一个用于生产的低延迟Black-Scholes隐含波动率求解器，通过标准化输入、结合廉价种子与Householder迭代优化，在保持接近Jäckel参考价格的同时显著提升速度，并提供可选的高精度修正模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提出一种能够平衡计算速度与精度、适合生产环境的隐含波动率求解方法，以解决现有求解器在延迟或精度上的不足。

Method: 将输入标准化为虚值期权价格，使用尾稳定的erfcx/对数价格残差；热路径结合廉价的Li/渐近种子值与固定的无分支Householder迭代精化，并辅以边界保护处理；FlashIV+额外加入Jäckel-Newton修正以提升精度。

Result: 在常规和压力测试中，FlashIV保持接近Jäckel参考价格，同时速度显著快于标准化的Java移植版Jäckel's Let's Be Rational求解器。

Conclusion: FlashIV提供了低延迟且精度可控的隐含波动率求解方案，FlashIV+则允许用户在延迟与参考价格对齐度之间进行权衡。

Abstract: FlashIV is a low-latency Black--Scholes implied-volatility solver for production use. It normalises each input to an out-of-the-money price and solves a tail-stable erfcx/log-price residual. The hot path combines a cheap Li/asymptotic seed with a fixed, branch-light Householder refinement and guarded boundary handling. Across regular and stressed benchmarks, FlashIV stays close to the expanded Jäckel reference price while running materially faster than a normalised Java port of Jäckel's \emph{Let's Be Rational}. FlashIV+ adds an optional Jäckel--Newton correction for applications that need tighter agreement with that reference price, trading latency for reference-price alignment.

</details>


<div id='econ.EM'></div>

# econ.EM [[Back]](#toc)

### [138] [Graph Neural Networks for Generalized Mundlak Estimator under Network Confounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29238)
*Lianyan Fu,Rui Wang,Zihan Zhang*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文提出基于图神经网络的广义Mundlak估计量(GME-GNN)，通过组级平衡统计量和消息传递机制，在控制组间混杂的同时捕捉组内依赖，实现有效的跨组比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统固定效应模型假设过于严格（线性可加性、组内独立性），且局限于组内比较，无法进行有效的跨组推断，需要更灵活的估计方法。

Method: GME-GNN通过聚合组级平衡统计量替代传统组别截距项来控制组间混杂，利用图神经网络的消息传递机制自适应学习非线性表征并捕捉组内交互效应。

Result: 理论分析表明该估计量具有双重稳健性且渐近正态；仿真和实证研究验证了其性能优于传统方法。

Conclusion: GME-GNN放松了传统固定效应模型的严格假设，为存在组级异质性和组内依赖的数据提供了更灵活、有效的推断工具。

Abstract: This paper proposes a generalized Mundlak estimator based on graph neural networks (GME-GNN). The estimator is designed to mitigate bias arising from group-level heterogeneity and to accommodate within-group dependence among individuals. Traditional fixed-effects models handle group heterogeneity via group-specific intercepts, but require overly strict linear additivity and intra-group independence assumptions, and are confined to within-group comparisons. Rather than relying on intercepts, GME-GNN uses aggregated group-level balancing statistics to fully control between-group confounding, enabling valid cross-group comparisons and relaxing linearity constraints. It further employs graph neural network message-passing to adaptively learn nonlinear representations and capture intra-group interaction effects. Theoretical analysis shows that the estimator satisfies double robustness and is asymptotically normal. Simulation and empirical studies confirm its performance.

</details>


### [139] [Generalized Spectral Testing with Sample Splitting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29315)
*Yuxin Tao,Feiyu Jiang,Xiaofeng Shao*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文提出一种样本分割广义谱检验方法，用于参数化时间序列模型的拟合优度检验。该方法通过分割样本估计参数并计算残差，避免了参数估计效应的影响，具有无需带宽选择、计算效率高等优点，并在模拟和实证中表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在参数化时间序列模型的残差拟合优度检验中，参数估计效应会改变检验统计量的极限行为，导致传统全样本检验方法复杂且计算成本高。本文旨在设计一种样本分割方法，使得残差过程在参数估计后仍能保持与基于真实误差的不可实现过程相同的极限分布，从而简化推断并提高计算效率。

Method: 提出样本分割广义谱检验：在拟合子样本上估计模型参数，在检验子样本上基于残差构造广义谱Cramér-von Mises统计量。该方法聚合所有滞后阶数的条件均值限制，无需带宽选择或截断滞后选择。通过简单乘子自助法近似极限分布，无需生成自助法时间序列或重新估计参数。

Result: 在温和正则条件和得分对齐条件下，基于残差的过程与基于真实误差的不可实现过程具有相同的极限零分布。该方法在固定备择假设下具有一致性，在局部备择假设下具有非平凡功效。模拟和实证分析表明，该方法能良好控制检验水平，具有可比功效，并在需要重复估计的模型中显著降低计算负担。

Conclusion: 本文提出的样本分割广义谱检验有效解决了参数估计效应对时间序列模型拟合优度检验的影响。其“预言等价”特性与全样本检验形成鲜明对比，后者需要重新估计每个自助法样本中的参数。该方法兼具理论完备性和实际计算优势。

Abstract: Residual-based goodness-of-fit tests for parametric time-series models are often complicated by parameter-estimation effects, which can alter the limiting behavior of diagnostic statistics. We propose a sample-splitting generalized spectral test (in the spirit of Escanciano(2006)) for assessing conditional mean specification in linear and nonlinear time-series models. The procedure estimates the model parameter on a fitting subsample and constructs a generalized spectral Cramer-von Mises statistic from residuals computed on a checking/testing subsample. The statistic aggregates pairwise conditional mean restrictions over all lags and is therefore bandwidth-free and free of truncation-lag selection. Under mild regularity conditions and a score-alignment condition, the residual-based process has the same limiting null distribution as the infeasible oracle process based on the true errors. Although the resulting limiting law is still non-pivotal, it can be consistently approximated by a simple multiplier bootstrap that does not require generating bootstrap time series or re-estimating parameters. Such an oracle-equivalence property is in sharp contrast to the original full-sample test, for which parameter estimation contributes an additional first-order term to the limiting process, and requires re-estimating parameters in each bootstrapped sample. We further establish consistency of the proposed test against fixed alternatives and nontrivial power against local alternatives. Extensive simulations and real data analyses show that the proposed test controls size well, has comparable power, and delivers substantial computational savings in models where repeated estimation is costly.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [140] [Identifiability of Low Frequency Li-ion Battery Parameters in Time Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28901)
*Vladimir Sovljanski,Mario Paolone*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种利用低频时域测量数据（来自BMS）辨识电池等效电路模型中低频参数（包括恒相位元件CPE）的框架，通过高阶RC网络近似CPE，结合约束非凸最小二乘求解，在典型噪声下达到平均误差低于1%的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际车载BMS采样频率低、测量分辨率有限，导致电池ECM的低频参数（尤其是反映扩散现象的CPE）难以准确辨识，亟需一种适用于低采样率、低精度测量条件下的建模与参数估计方法。

Method: 采用具有递归定义的高阶RC网络在时域近似CPE，将参数估计建模为离散状态空间表示下的约束非凸最小二乘问题，并严格推导参数初始化策略、取值范围及RC支路数选择流程。

Result: 在提供一次调频服务的电力系统数值仿真中，面对典型的BMS测量噪声水平，该方法从时域测量数据中实现了低频参数（含CPE）的准确估计，平均误差低于1%。

Conclusion: 所提出的建模与辨识框架能够有效克服实际BMS低采样率和有限分辨率的限制，实现电池ECM低频参数的高精度估计，具有工程实用性。

Abstract: This paper investigates the identification of observable low-frequency (LF) parameters of battery cell's equivalent circuit models (ECMs) using time-domain voltage and current measurements sampled at low frequency by built-in battery management systems (BMS) during operation. Accurate estimation of such parameters is challenging due to measurement resolution available in practical settings. To address this, a modeling and identification framework is proposed in which fractional constant phase element (CPE), commonly used to model LF diffusion phenomena of battery cells, is approximated in the time domain using a high-order RC network with a recursive definition. The parameter estimation problem is formulated as a constrained, non-convex least-squares problem in a discretized state-space representation. To improve robustness, parameter initialization strategies, bounds, and a procedure for selecting the number of RC branches are rigorously derived. The method is evaluated in a numerical study based on a power system application where the battery under the study provides primary frequency control to the grid. Under noise levels representative of typical BMS measurements, the proposed approach achieves, from time-domain measurements, accurate LF parameter estimation (including the CPE), with average errors below 1 %.

</details>


### [141] [Tensorized Radiative Heat Transfer for a Scalable and Calibrated Building Energy Simulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29003)
*Sang woo Ham,Donghun Kim,Michael Rossetti,John Sipple*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文为智能建筑控制套件(sbsim)开发并集成了一个完整的张量化辐射传热模块，包括内部和外部辐射机制（天空与地面长波辐射、太阳短波辐射），提高了建筑能耗仿真的物理精度，为强化学习控制策略提供更真实的训练环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的建筑能耗仿真对于开发需求灵活性和电网响应的先进控制策略至关重要。先前sbsim模型仅包含内部长波辐射，缺乏外部辐射过程（天空/地面长波辐射和太阳短波辐射），导致物理保真度不足，无法为强化学习提供足够真实的训练环境。

Method: 提出一种完整的辐射传热实现方案，将外部辐射机制（天空和地面的长波辐射交换、通过不透明和透明表面的太阳得热）以张量运算形式集成到sbsim的张量化有限差分模型中，保持与现有框架的兼容性及计算效率。

Result: 通过与已有仿真工具的对比验证，该实现提高了表面温度和建筑热负荷的预测精度，显著提升了sbsim的物理保真度。

Conclusion: 该增强模块使sbsim能够为建筑能耗优化与控制提供更真实的训练环境，尤其适用于强化学习等数据驱动的控制策略开发。

Abstract: Accurate building energy simulation is essential for developing advanced control strategies that enable demand flexibility and grid responsiveness. The Smart Buildings Control Suite (sbsim) offers a lightweight, scalable, and data-calibrated simulation environment based on a tensorized finite difference model. Previous work extended sbsim to include interior long-wave radiative heat exchange between indoor surfaces. However, a complete thermal model must also account for exterior radiative processes, including long-wave radiation exchange with the sky and surroundings, as well as short-wave solar radiation incident on building surfaces. This paper presents a comprehensive radiative heat transfer implementation for sbsim that integrates both interior and exterior radiation mechanisms. Our primary contribution is the development and integration of a fully tensorized exterior radiation module that captures sky and ground long-wave exchange as well as solar heat gains through opaque and transparent surfaces. By formulating these processes as tensor operations compatible with the existing framework, we preserve the computational efficiency necessary for reinforcement learning applications. We validate our implementation against established simulation tools and demonstrate improved prediction accuracy for surface temperatures and building thermal loads. This enhancement significantly increases the physical fidelity of sbsim, enabling more realistic training environments for building energy optimization and control.

</details>


### [142] [Local Observability and Moving Horizon Estimation-based Training of Feedforward Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29013)
*Yi Yang,Victor G. Lopez,Matthias A. Müller*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于移动视域估计（MHE）的前馈神经网络训练方法，从控制论角度分析网络可观测性，并给出收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络训练方法缺乏严格的理论分析，作者希望从控制论视角提供可观测性和收敛性的理论保证。

Method: 将FNN重写为以权重为状态的动力系统；分析两层及多层FNN的可观测性；基于持续激励输入设计方法；采用MHE在可观测子空间投影上更新权重。

Result: 两层FNN在固定输出权重下满足可观测秩条件；多层FNN一般不满足可观测秩条件；所提方法具有局部可观测性和收敛保证。

Conclusion: 控制论视角的MHE训练方法可为ReLU激活的FNN提供理论可观测性和收敛性保障，数值实验验证了有效性。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a moving horizon estimation (MHE)-based training method for feedforward neural networks (FNNs) with rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation functions to determine their ideal weights from a control-theoretic perspective. This allows for a rigorous theoretical analysis of the trained network. First, we reformulate the FNN as a dynamical system with the weights as states. Then, we investigate the local observability of such a system. For two-layer FNNs with fixed output weights, we derive a sufficient condition under which the observability rank condition holds, ensuring a locally observable state. We also show that multi-layer FNNs in general fail to satisfy the observability rank condition. Based on this analysis, we develop a persistently exciting (PE) input design method, which renders a state distinguishable from its neighbors. The resulting local observability provides convergence guarantees for the proposed MHE-based training, where only the projection of the state onto the observable subspace is updated using a fixed-length window of input-output data. The effectiveness of the approach is illustrated via numerical examples.

</details>


### [143] [Grid Capacity Expansion under Data Centers and Electrified Manufacturing Large Loads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29053)
*Jiyong Lee,Melody Agustin,Joanne Langsdorf,Erhan Kutanolgu,Michael Baldea,Ilias Mitrai*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个多周期电网容量扩展模型，用于优化数据中心和电气化制造业等新兴大负荷下的发电、储能和输电投资，并以ERCOT系统为案例进行七年规划分析，发现最优投资使发电容量增加83.6%，并揭示了建设时间对投资时机和技术组合的关键影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据中心和电气化制造业等新兴大负荷给电网带来巨大压力，需要系统性的规划方法来指导电网扩容投资决策。

Method: 建立多周期电网容量扩展模型，考虑小时级电力调度、发电/储能/输电联合投资优化，并提出大负荷空间分布的新建模方法。

Result: 以ERCOT系统为案例，数据中心和电气化炼油分别占年末总用电量的17.5%和4.7%；最优投资使发电容量增加83.6%，偏好太阳能和储能的短建设周期及火电的灵活性；敏感性分析显示资产建设时间显著影响投资时机、技术组合和输电扩容。

Conclusion: 该建模框架具有通用性，可扩展至其他电网系统，支持多种需求情景、政策假设和区域特征的探索。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider the expansion of power grids under emerging large loads from data centers and electrified manufacturing. We develop a multi-period grid capacity expansion model to determine optimal investment profiles for power generation, storage, and transmission capacity while accounting for hourly power dispatch, such that electricity demand is satisfied and the total planning and operation cost is minimized. We also propose a new modeling approach regarding the spatial distribution of demand from large loads. The model is used to analyze the expansion of a synthetic grid that follows key characteristics of the ERCOT system over a seven-year planning horizon, under loads from data centers and electrified oil refining, which account for 17.5% and 4.7% of total annual electricity demand by the end of the planning horizon. The optimal investment policy leads to an 83.6% increase in generation capacity and exploits the short construction times of solar and storage as well as the operational flexibility of thermal generators. Finally, sensitivity analysis reveals that the construction time of grid assets substantially impacts investment timing, generation technology mix, and transmission capacity expansion. The proposed modeling framework is general and can be extended to other grid systems, enabling the exploration of diverse demand scenarios, policy assumptions, and regional characteristics.

</details>


### [144] [Energy-Optimal Thermal Management of Heat-Pump Battery Electric Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29104)
*Prashant Lokur,Nikolce Murgovski*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对热泵电池电动汽车的能量最优混合控制框架，将规则式监督层与连续非线性模型预测控制(NMPC)结合，在满足座舱舒适度和部件温度约束的同时最小化热能耗，在寒冷气候工况下相比传统规则控制器实现20-28%的能耗降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电动汽车热管理系统的能耗对续航里程影响显著，现有规则式控制器效率较低，而纯优化控制方法计算负担大且难以处理离散配置问题，亟需一种兼顾计算效率与能耗最优的混合控制方案。

Method: 采用混合控制架构：上层为规则式监督层处理离散系统配置切换，下层为连续NMPC优化器最小化有限预测时域内的热能耗。构建面向控制的简化动力学模型（含座舱、制冷剂回路、可重构冷却液回路及电池/电机/逆变器等关键热质量），模型经高保真参考验证，均温预测误差<1.8°C，仿真时间缩减85%。终端代价通过准稳态线性化及离散代数Riccati方程求解，确保各工况下优化问题适定性。

Result: 在MathWorks Simscape高保真热泵模型上测试，于寒冷气候扩展驾驶工况下，相比内置规则控制器，热能耗稳定降低20-28%。控制模型对电池、电机及座舱温度的平均预测误差低于1.8°C，仿真速度提升约85%。

Conclusion: 所提混合控制框架在保证计算可行性的前提下显著提升了热管理系统能效，且基于CasADi的开源实现为后续研究提供了可复现的基准。

Abstract: This paper presents an energy-optimal hybrid control framework for thermal management of heat-pump battery electric vehicles (BEVs). The controller coordinates the compressor, coolant pumps, and cabin blower across the coupled refrigerant, coolant, and air loops, while enforcing cabin comfort and component temperature constraints. The framework combines a rule-based supervisory layer, which handles discrete system configuration, with a continuous nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) optimizer that minimizes thermal energy consumption over a finite prediction horizon. A control-oriented model is developed to capture the dominant dynamics of the cabin, refrigerant loop, reconfigurable coolant circuits, and key thermal masses including the battery, motor, and inverter. The model is validated against a high-fidelity reference, achieving a mean absolute temperature prediction error below \SI{1.8}{\celsius} for key thermal states including the battery, motor, and cabin air temperature, while reducing simulation time by approximately \SI{85}{\percent}. The terminal cost is computed by linearizing the system about a quasi-steady operating point and solving the discrete-time algebraic Riccati equation, ensuring well-conditioned optimization across varying operating conditions. The proposed framework is evaluated against the built-in rule-based controller of MathWorks Simscape \emph{Electric Vehicle Thermal Management with Heat Pump} model under cold-climate extended driving conditions, demonstrating consistent reductions of \SI{20}{}-\SI{28}{\percent} in thermal energy consumption across all tested scenarios. The complete implementation, developed using the open-source CasADi framework, is made openly available at \href{https://github.com/PrashantLokur/ThermalEnergyManagementWithHybridControlFramework}{GitHub} repository to support reproducibility and further development.

</details>


### [145] [Distributed Non-Uniform Scaling Control of Multi-Agent Formation with Dynamic Agent Joining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29191)
*Tao He,Gangshan Jing*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种分布式控制框架，使得多智能体系统在进行非均匀缩放（各轴不同比例）的编队机动过程中，能够动态加入新智能体，同时保持图拉普拉斯矩阵的谱特性。仿真验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有编队控制方法大多假设智能体集合固定，无法应对需要动态扩展团队规模的场景。本文旨在解决非均匀缩放编队中动态加入新成员的难题。

Method: 提出一种分布式控制框架，在任意维度下进行非均匀缩放机动时，允许新智能体加入编队，并通过保持图拉普拉斯矩阵的谱特性来保证系统稳定性。

Result: 仿真实验证明了所提出理论结果的有效性，表明编队可在非均匀缩放过程中成功扩展。

Conclusion: 本文填补了动态编队扩展在非均匀缩放场景下的空白，为复杂环境下的多智能体协同提供了更灵活的控制方案。

Abstract: Non-uniform scaling control of formation enables multi-agent systems to adjust their shape by scaling with different ratios along different coordinate axes, offering enhanced flexibility in complex environments. However, like most existing formation maneuver strategies, it typically assumes a fixed set of agents, limiting its applicability in scenarios requiring dynamic team expansion. This paper introduces a distributed control framework that enables a formation to incorporate new agents during non-uniform scaling maneuvers in arbitrary dimensions while preserving the spectral properties of the graph Laplacian. Simulation examples validate the effectiveness of the theoretical results.

</details>


### [146] [Closed-Loop Identification of Periodically Time-Varying Systems via Cyclic Reformulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29385)
*Hiroshi Okajima*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对开环不稳定线性周期时变（LPTV）系统，提出了一种基于闭环数据驱动的精确代数提取定理与辨识算法，无需开环实验即可恢复植物模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开环不稳定的LPTV系统无法进行开环实验，现有闭环辨识方法存在状态增广或稳定性限制，亟需一种无需开环实验、不要求恢复模型稳定的精确辨识框架。

Method: 首先推导了循环闭环实现的代数植物提取定理：在控制器路径满足可逆性条件下，可从稳定闭环映射的共享状态空间实现中直接恢复循环植物传递矩阵。基于该定理构建闭环辨识算法：对循环信号应用标准子空间辨识，执行代数植物提取，再通过坐标变换恢复LPTV植物状态空间参数。

Result: 数值实验成功恢复了开环稳定与不稳定的SISO LPTV植物，并通过马尔可夫参数比较验证了MIMO情况的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文将数据生成稳定性要求从开环植物转移至内部稳定的闭环系统，为开环不稳定LPTV系统提供了一种无需状态增广的精确闭环辨识方案。

Abstract: This paper studies closed-loop identification of linear periodically time-varying (LPTV) plants, with emphasis on open-loop unstable plants for which open-loop experiments are not practically available. The central contribution is an exact algebraic plant-extraction theorem for cycled closed-loop realizations: for square strictly proper plants and a controller path satisfying an invertibility condition, the cycled plant transfer matrix is recovered from a shared state-space realization of the stable closed-loop maps from the external reference to the plant output and to the control input, without state augmentation, and without requiring the recovered plant realization to be stable. Thus, the stability requirement for data generation is shifted from the open-loop plant to the internally stable closed-loop system. Building on this result, a closed-loop identification algorithm is constructed that takes the reference, output, and input signals as data, applies standard subspace identification to the cycled signals, performs the algebraic plant extraction, and recovers the LPTV plant state-space parameters via a coordinate transformation; the conditioning of the inverse controller path governs the reliability of the extraction step. Numerical examples demonstrate the recovery of stable and open-loop unstable SISO LPTV plants and validate a MIMO case through coordinate-invariant Markov-parameter comparisons.

</details>


### [147] [Decoupled Thrust-Axis Attitude Control Using Quaternions for Chandrayaan-3 Lunar Landing Mission](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29409)
*Aditya Rallapalli,Suraj Kumar,Rijesh M P,Ashok Kumar Kakula,Bharat Kumar GVP*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于四元数的解耦方法，用于月球着陆器制导与控制系统的姿态指令生成，解决了四元数最短路径特性导致的制导-控制耦合问题，并通过月船三号任务验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 四元数控制律虽能避免奇异性，但其固有的三轴耦合特性（特别是最短路径属性）会导致推力轴大角度旋转时产生制导与控制的非期望相互作用，影响姿态指令的正确生成。

Method: 提出一种基于四元数的解耦方法，实现推力轴的独立控制，将推力轴对准所需加速度矢量，同时约束绕推力轴的旋转，从而消除制导-控制耦合。

Result: 成功实现了推力轴的独立控制，缓解了制导与控制之间的相互作用，确保了着陆器姿态指令的正确生成。

Conclusion: 该四元数解耦方法为月球软着陆任务中的制导与控制解耦提供了一种有效方案，可推广至其他需要推力轴独立控制的航天器姿态控制场景。

Abstract: Chandrayaan-3 mission achieved a historic milestone with its successful soft landing near the lunar south pole, highlighting the critical role of the navigation, guidance, and control (NGC) system. Navigation provided vehicle state estimates relative to the Moon center, while a polynomial based guidance scheme computed the required acceleration profile to meet terminal landing conditions. This acceleration demand was translated into total thrust magnitude and attitude commands generation. Attitude command generation involved aligning the thrust axis with the required acceleration vector and constraining rotation about the thrust axis, typically governed by mission-specific requirements. Although quaternion-based control laws are preferred for their singularity-free representation, they inherently couple all three rotational axes. This coupling can lead to undesirable interactions between guidance and control, especially during large rotations about the thrust axis, due to the quaternion shortest-path property. This paper proposes a novel quaternion-based decoupling method that enables independent thrust-axis control, mitigating guidance-control interaction and ensuring proper attitude commands generation for lander attitude control.

</details>


### [148] [Real-Time Retargeting Using Controllability Boundary for Chandrayaan-3 Lunar Landing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29412)
*Suraj Kumar,Debjyoti Chakrabarti,Aditya Rallapalli,Bharat Kumar GVP,Ashok Kumar Kakula*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文介绍了为月船三号月球着陆任务开发的实时重定向制导策略，利用可控性边界的凸表示实现快速可行性检查和实时目标更新，是数据驱动重定向框架在操作型月球着陆任务中的首次应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当标称着陆点不可行时，需要一种能够实时重定向到备用着陆点的安全制导策略，以应对月球着陆任务中的不确定性。

Method: 提出了一种高层重定向策略，利用可控性边界的凸表示进行快速可行性检查，支持实时目标更新；基线制导则生成接近燃料最优的下降轨迹。

Result: 通过飞行前仿真和月船三号实际飞行数据验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 这是数据驱动重定向框架在操作型月球着陆任务中的首次成功应用，为未来月球及行星着陆任务提供了可行的实时制导方案。

Abstract: This paper presents the real-time retargeting guidance policy developed for the Chandrayaan-3 lunar landing mission. The baseline guidance generates approximate fuel-optimal descent trajectories, while a high-level policy enables safe retargeting to alternate sites when the nominal site becomes infeasible. The retargeting strategy leverages a convex representation of the controllability boundary, allowing rapid feasibility checks and real-time target updates. To the best of the authors knowledge, this represents the first application of a data-driven retargeting framework in an operational lunar landing mission. Pre-flight simulations and Chandrayaan-3 flight results validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [149] [Robustness Enhancement of Consensus Networks: the Optimal Memory Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29527)
*Jiamin Wang,Jian Liu,Feng Xiao,Haibin Duan,Yuanshi Zheng*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究多智能体共识网络中局部记忆对鲁棒性的增强效应，提出一种带单步记忆和可调记忆深度的共识协议，证明记忆能提升H2性能，且最优记忆深度出现在最近或最远记忆，取决于参数区域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解集体鲁棒性的控制因素及其增强机制是网络科学的核心问题，受神经科学中记忆层级时间结构的启发，探索智能体局部记忆深度对共识网络鲁棒性的影响。

Method: 基于线性外推，提出具有单步记忆和可调记忆深度的共识协议；推导达成共识的充要条件；建立依赖于记忆因子、记忆深度、耦合增益和拉普拉斯谱的H2性能指标解析表达式。

Result: 协议具有跨记忆深度的可继承共识特性；在实时信息与记忆信息平衡使用下，任何可达深度的记忆均能提升H2性能；最优记忆深度出现在最近或最远记忆，取决于参数区域。

Conclusion: 阐明局部记忆深度对多智能体网络鲁棒性的增强机制，揭示了最近或最远记忆作为最优记忆深度的条件，为网络鲁棒性设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Understanding what governs collective robustness and how it can be enhanced remains a central pursuit in network science. This paper investigates the robustness of multi-agent consensus networks, quantified by the $H_2$ performance metric, and delves into the enhancing effect of agents' local memory on it. Inspired by the hierarchical temporal structure of memory observed in neuroscience, we focus on the role of memory depth, which reflects the temporal features of memory from recent to remote. Building on linear extrapolation, we propose a consensus protocol with single-step memory and tunable memory depth, derive the necessary and sufficient condition for achieving consensus, and show that the protocol exhibits an inheritable consensus property across memory depths. Furthermore, analytical expressions for the $H_2$ performance metric, which depend on the memory factor, memory depth, coupling gain, and Laplacian spectrum, are established. Under balanced usage of real-time and memory information, we demonstrate that memory at any accessible depth enhances $H_2$ performance, and the optimal memory depth occurs at either the most recent or the most remote memory, contingent upon certain parameter regions. Further detailed discussions are provided to clarify the broader implications of our findings.

</details>


### [150] [Teleoperation Operational Design Domain based on Minimal Risk Maneuver Capability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29818)
*Leon Johann Brettin,Nayel Fabian Salem,Ole Hans,Markus Maurer*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对远程操控道路车辆，提出了一个专门设计的运行设计域（ODD）概念，将原本用于自动驾驶的ODD概念适配到远程操作场景中。核心思路是：不依赖网络可靠性，而是基于远程操控车辆执行最小风险 maneuvers 的能力来定义 ODD，并通过用例展示了该概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着远程操控车辆在常规交通中越来越常见，需要明确其在何种运行条件下能够且被允许行驶。目前主要基于网络性能来选择运行条件，但从安全角度看，难以保证网络连接的足够可靠性，因此需要一种新的、更安全的ODD定义方法。

Method: 将自动驾驶的ODD概念适配到远程操作领域：提出基于远程操控车辆执行最小风险 maneuvers（最小风险机动）的能力来定义ODD，该能力依赖于一个专门为此目的设计的独立系统，并通过一个用例进行概念演示。

Result: 提出了一个不依赖网络连接可靠性的远程操作ODD概念框架，并通过用例示例展示了该概念的实际应用可行性。

Conclusion: 基于车辆自身执行最小风险 maneuver 的能力来定义ODD，比依赖网络性能更安全、更可靠，为远程操控车辆的安全运行提供了新的标准化思路。

Abstract: This article discusses the concept of an Operational Design Domain (ODD) designed specifically for teleoperated road vehicles. For this purpose, the ODD concept designed for automated driving is adapted for teleoperation. As teleoperation becomes more common in regular traffic, the question arises under which operating conditions such vehicles are able and allowed to drive. Currently, these conditions are selected primarily based on network performance. From a safety perspective, it is difficult to base such a selection on a reliable connection because it is almost impossible to guarantee sufficient reliability. With this in mind, the ODD concept designed for automated driving is adapted for teleoperation: A concept is proposed for basing the ODD for a teleoperation system on the capability of the teleoperated vehicle to perform a minimal risk maneuver using a dedicated system designed solely for this purpose. This concept is then demonstrated using a use case example.

</details>


### [151] [Distributed Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for District Heating Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29841)
*Alessandro Bettoni,Giacomo Mastroddi,Marco Muttoni*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于交替方向乘子法(ADMM)的分布式非线性模型预测控制方法，用于区域供热网络。通过利用图模型建模热动力学，该控制器以分布式协作方式优化建筑物的质量流量吸收，在集中式控制的高性能和分散式方案的隐私保护之间取得平衡。在三建筑网络基准仿真中，与分散式模型预测控制方案进行了性能比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有集中式控制性能优越但存在隐私泄露问题，而分散式方案虽能保护隐私但性能有限。需要在性能与隐私之间寻找折中方案。

Method: 采用基于图的热动力学建模方法，结合交替方向乘子法(ADMM)实现分布式非线性模型预测控制，在建筑之间以协作方式优化质量流量吸收。

Result: 在三建筑网络基准仿真中，与分散式模型预测控制方案进行了对比，验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的分布式协作控制方案能够兼顾集中式控制的优越性能和分散式方案的隐私保护优势，为区域供热网络提供了一种有效的控制策略。

Abstract: This paper presents a distributed nonlinear model predictive control that uses alternating direction method of mul tipliers for district heating networks. Exploiting a graph-based modeling of the thermal dynamics, our controller optimizes the mass flow absorption of buildings in a distributed cooperative scheme that mediates between the superior performance of the centralized control and the privacy preservation of the decentralized schemes. A benchmark three-building network simulation is used to compare the performance of the proposed solution with a decentralized model predictive control scheme.

</details>


### [152] [BuilDyn: Excitation-Driven Data Generation for Building Thermal Dynamics Modeling and Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29849)
*Felix Koch,Thomas Krug,Fabian Raisch,Benjamin Schäfer,Benjamin Tischler*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了BuilDyn，一个基于BuilDa的可定制激励策略包，用于面向控制的数据生成，支持从代表性建筑分布中采样，并通过Python接口集成到ML管道中。实验表明，使用激励数据训练的模型性能优于非激励数据训练的模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据集和仿真环境主要反映固定控制策略下的稳态运行，导致激励不足，模型对未见过的运行条件鲁棒性差。需要一种支持可定制激励策略的数据生成工具。

Method: 基于BuilDa开发BuilDyn包，提供可定制激励策略用于控制导向的数据生成，支持从代表性建筑分布中采样，并提供Python接口便于集成到机器学习流程。

Result: 通过在单个建筑上比较数据驱动ML模型在非激励数据和激励数据上的性能，证明了BuilDyn的优势——激励数据训练的模型表现更好。

Conclusion: BuilDyn有望推进可扩展的控制导向建模，支持迁移学习和建筑特定基础模型等未来方向。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) is increasingly used for data-driven modeling of buildings to enable downstream tasks such as fault detection and diagnosis, and energy-efficient control. While recent work improves generalization across building characteristics, weather, and occupancy, generalization also depends on sufficient exploration of the control-driven system state space.
