Motivation: 在涉及多种治疗的随机试验中，双变量生存结局给决策带来了显著的分析挑战，现有方法难以有效处理这类复杂数据以优化个体化治疗规则。

Method: 通过深度神经网络建模个体化治疗规则，采用随机策略（stochastic policies）表示治疗方案，利用链接函数（link function）耦合边际加速失效时间模型以刻画双变量依赖关系，并引入自适应预测增强方法（adaptive prediction-powered method）利用机器学习模型的辅助预测来提升决策的鲁棒性和有效性。

Result: 该方法能够有效处理右删失数据，最大化固定时间点(t1, t2)上的联合生存概率，并利用辅助预测增强了决策的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 本文提出的框架为多治疗、双变量生存结局下的个体化治疗规则优化提供了新颖且有效的解决方案，具有较好的鲁棒性和实际应用价值。

Abstract: In randomized trials involving multiple treatments, bivariate survival outcomes present significant analytical challenges for making decisions. This paper addresses the problem of deriving optimal individualized treatment rules to maximize the joint survival probability beyond fixed time points $(t_1, t_2)$ through deep neural networks, while accounting for right censoring. We propose a novel approach that models treatment rules via stochastic policies, coupling marginal accelerated failure time models via link function to capture bivariate dependence. To enhance robustness and effectiveness of decision making, we introduce an adaptive prediction-powered method that leverages auxiliary predictions from machine learning models.

</details>


### [301] [Matching Rates and Optimal Allocation for Federated Probe-Logit Distillation under Heterogeneous Bandwidth Budgets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29642)
*Prasanjit Dubey,Xiaoming Huo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文严格证明了联邦语言模型中带宽项的 minimax 率，并将结果推广到异构带宽场景，提出了最优带宽分配策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前工作中联邦探针-逻辑蒸馏（FPLD）的带宽项率是否紧致，以及如何推广到异构节点带宽设置，这两个问题尚未解决。

Method: 1) 使用抖动量化（dithered quantizer）构造匹配的单轮下界；2) 针对多轮顺序细化，提出嵌套/缩放残差量化器；3) 建立异构带宽上界，推导闭合形式的最优分配规则（对数倾斜注水法则）；4) 设计自适应变体，利用预热阶段估计权重。

Result: 1) 单轮下界 Ω(K^{-1}·2^{-2B/V}) 与上界匹配，确认为 Θ(K^{-1}·2^{-2B/V})；2) T 轮优化可达 O(K^{-1}·2^{-2TB/V})；3) 异构带宽下的最优分配为对数倾斜注水规则；4) 自适应变体达到 1+O(√log(K/δ)/(mT0)) 相对次优性。

Conclusion: 本文彻底解决了 FPLD 带宽项的紧致性问题，并成功推广到异构带宽场景，为联邦语言模型中的通信高效训练提供了理论基础。

Abstract: In federated language modeling, $K$ nodes each hold $n$ samples but cannot pool data or exchange full-precision gradients or weights. We study the minimax rate at which a conditional distribution over $V$ tokens can be estimated when each node may upload at most $B$ bits per query in a public probe set. In federated probe-logit distillation (FPLD), each node transmits a scalar-quantized logit vector on the probe set, and an aggregator distills a global parametric student. Prior work (Dubey and Huo, 2026) establishes a high-probability KL rate $O(d/(Kn) + ρ\sqrt{V \log V / m} + K^{-1} \cdot 2^{-2B/V})$ plus optimization slack, with the bandwidth term in its trace-sharpened form. Whether this bandwidth-term rate is tight, and how the upper bound generalizes to heterogeneous per-node bandwidths, are left open.
  We close both gaps. First, the dithered FPLD construction has a matching single-round lower bound $Ω(K^{-1} \cdot 2^{-2B/V})$ under non-degeneracy, pinning the bandwidth-axis rate at $Θ(K^{-1} \cdot 2^{-2B/V})$. $T$-round sequential refinement with nested/scaled residual quantizers achieves $O(K^{-1} \cdot 2^{-2TB/V})$; vanilla FPLD's $T$-independent bandwidth term is suboptimal for every $T > 1$. Second, we establish a heterogeneous-bandwidth upper bound for per-node budgets $B_i$, paired with a closed-form optimal allocation $B_i^* = B_{\mathrm{tot}}/K + (V/2) \log_2(w_i / \bar{w}_g)$, a log-tilted water-filling rule that is the per-node analogue of reverse water-filling for distortion-rate optimization. A plug-in adaptive variant estimates the weights from a short warm-up phase and attains $1 + O(\sqrt{\log(K/δ)/(m T_0)})$ relative suboptimality. Synthetic n-gram simulations confirm that empirical KL is bracketed by the upper and lower bounds and that the optimal allocation strictly dominates uniform and inverse-weighted baselines under heterogeneous clipping.

</details>


### [302] [Eigen-Spike Emergence and Quadratic Equivalents for Conjugate Kernels on Nonlinearly Separable Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29669)
*Collin Cranston,Zhichao Wang,Todd Kemp,Michael W. Mahoney*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文利用随机矩阵理论（RMT）中的确定性等价方法，研究前馈神经网络的共轭核（CK）在XOR非线性可分数据上的谱行为，揭示了信息特征值与标签对齐的BBP型相变，从而建立了线性分类可学习性的精确条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RMT的确定性等价方法将复杂非线性随机矩阵近似为线性替代模型，但该方法在非线性可分数据（如XOR问题）上是否仍然有效尚不清楚。本文旨在通过分析共轭核的特征值及特征向量与标签的渐近对齐程度，来检验线性等价的适用性。

Method: 针对XOR问题下的共轭核矩阵，构建了一种鲁棒的二次型等价模型；通过分析样本复杂度、信噪比、非线性激活函数选择和预训练特征等关键因素，推导出尖峰特征值（spiked eigenvalues）及其对应特征向量与标签对齐的BBP型相变条件。

Result: 发现了在多种机器学习常见调控场景下，线性分类通过CK特征向量变得可能的精确相变边界；表明确定性等价方法能够有效推广到非线性可分数据的分析中。

Conclusion: 本研究将RMT中的确定性等价工具成功应用于ML实践中具有现实意义的问题（非线性可分分类），为该理论框架在实际深度学习分析中的可用性提供了有力支撑。

Abstract: Recent work in random matrix theory (RMT) has developed the notion of deterministic equivalents: typically linear surrogate models that approximate the spectral behavior of large nonlinear random matrices, such as nonlinear feature maps in neural networks (NNs). On the one hand, these deterministic equivalents make theoretical predictions tractable by reducing a complex model to a simpler model with properties that fall under the umbrella of classical RMT tools. However, this leaves open the question of whether this idealized linear equivalence remains meaningful when dealing with high-dimensional nonlinearly separable data, such as performing clssification on nonlinearly separable data. Motivated by this, we consider the conjugate kernel (CK), which is the nonlinear feature map of a feedforward NN, under a canonical nonlinearly separable dataset, the XOR problem; and we use the study of informative outlier eigenvalues in the CK and whether their corresponding eigenvectors asymptotically align with XOR labels as a proxy for nonlinear learnability. We develop a robust quadratic equivalent to the spiked CK matrix that enables a precise analysis of emergent informative spikes, as one modifies various knobs common in ML practice: sample complexity, signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), nonlinear activation choice, and pretrained features. In each of these scenarios, we derive a precise BBP-type phase transition in which linear classification via the CK eigenvectors becomes possible. Our analysis helps translate the power of deterministic equivalence tools in RMT to study problems of practical relevance in ML.

</details>


### [303] [Instance-dependent Stochastic Lipschitz bandit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29748)
*Marius Potfer,Vianney Perchet*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对Lipschitz bandit问题提出了一种新的算法和分析框架，通过积分子最优性间隙在水平集上的分布，得到比传统zooming维度更精细的自适应遗憾界，并在最大化者集维度d*>0时严格改进了现有结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Lipschitz bandit的遗憾界要么是最坏情况下的，要么是通过zooming维度d_z实现自适应，但后者仅依赖于近最优水平集的渐近增长，无法捕捉函数f的更精细结构性质。作者希望得到更细粒度的实例依赖遗憾界。

Method: 提出一种新算法，通过积分f在其水平集上的子最优性间隙来刻画遗憾，从而自适应于水平集的局部增长而不仅仅是渐近行为。此外，将分析扩展到完全信息设定（Lipschitz experts），并放松部分正则性假设。

Result: 当最大化者集维度d*>0时，得到改进的自适应遗憾率$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{d_z+1/\max(d_z,d^\star)+2})$，严格优于经典zooming界。

Conclusion: 本文通过更精细的实例依赖分析，在理论上严格改进了Lipschitz bandit问题的遗憾界，拓展了自适应学习理论。

Abstract: We study the Lipschitz bandit problem, where a learner sequentially maximizes an unknown Lipschitz function $f$ over a domain $\mathcal{X} \subset [0,1]^d$ using noisy pointwise evaluations. Existing regret bounds are either worst-case, scaling as $\tildeΘ \left ( T^{d+1/d+2}\right )$, or adaptive via the zooming dimension $d_z$, yielding $\tildeΘ \left ( T^{d_z+1/d_z+2}\right )$. However, such zooming-based guarantees are only partially instance-dependent, as they depend solely on the asymptotic growth of near-optimal level sets and fail to capture finer structural properties of $f$. We provide an analysis and an algorithm that characterizes the regret through integrals of the suboptimality gap of $f$ over its level sets. This yields regret bounds that adapt to the local growth of level sets, rather than only their asymptotic behavior. As a corollary, when the set of maximizers has dimension $d^\star>0$, we obtain improved adaptive rates of order $\tilde{\mathcal{O}} \left ( T^{d_z+1 / \max(d_z,d^\star)+2}\right )$ strictly improving over classical zooming bounds in this regime. Finally, we extend our analysis to the full-information setting (Lipschitz experts) and show how some of the regularity assumptions can be relaxed.

</details>


### [304] [Joint Model and Data Sparsification via the Marginal Likelihood](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29908)
*Alexander Timans,Thomas Möllenhoff,Christian A. Naesseth,Mohammad Emtiyaz Khan,Eric Nalisnick*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种联合自动相关确定（ARD）方法，同时学习特征和样本的相关性，在贝叶斯框架下实现模型与数据的对称稀疏化，从而提高稀疏恢复的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的稀疏贝叶斯学习（SBL）依赖同方差噪声模型，对异常值和噪声误指定敏感，导致模型拟合和预测质量下降。

Method: 提出联合自动相关确定（Joint ARD），同时学习个体特征和样本的相关性，通过单一贝叶斯目标实现模型和数据的同步稀疏化，保持共轭性并支持闭式更新。

Result: 在多种回归任务中，联合ARD方法一致地产生了既稀疏又鲁棒的预测模型。

Conclusion: 联合ARD是传统SBL的自然扩展，能同时实现模型稀疏性和数据鲁棒性，与稳健回归和影响函数的视角一致。

Abstract: Sparse recovery in linear systems underpins applications from signal processing to high-dimensional regression. Sparse Bayesian Learning, grounded in the principle of automatic relevance determination (ARD), offers a practical Bayesian mechanism for feature sparsity via marginal likelihood optimization. Yet, its reliance on a homoscedastic noise model renders it sensitive to data contaminations such as outliers or misspecified noise, harming model fit and predictions. Instead, we propose jointly learning individual feature and sample relevancies, enabling simultaneous model and data sparsification via a single Bayesian objective. This symmetric pruning of model and data offers a natural extension that preserves conjugacy, admits closed-form updates for standard optimization procedures, and aligns with perspectives from robust regression and influence functions. Empirical results across diverse regression tasks affirm that a joint ARD approach consistently yields both sparse and robust prediction models.

</details>


### [305] [Diffusion Models Are Statistically Optimal for Learning Low-Dimensional Multi-Modal Distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30153)
*Jingda Wu,Changxiao Cai*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了扩散模型在学习支持于低维子空间并集上的分布时的样本复杂度，证明了在子高斯假设下，扩散模型仅需 $\widetilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-k \vee 2})$ 个样本即可达到 $\varepsilon$ 误差（1-Wasserstein距离），其中 $k$ 为内在维度。该近最优收敛率仅依赖于内在维度，显著优于先前受维度诅咒影响的理论保证，且不要求光滑性、有界密度或对数凹性等强假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型理论分析依赖于强正则性假设（如有界密度、全局光滑得分函数），无法捕捉低维流形和多峰结构等内在结构。本文旨在填补这一空白，从理论上证明扩散模型能够统计适应数据的低维内在结构。

Method: 考虑数据分布支持于 $k$ 维子空间并集，每个子空间内分布满足子高斯假设。通过分析扩散模型的得分匹配与采样过程的统计误差，导出样本复杂度上界 $\widetilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-k \vee 2})$。

Result: 扩散模型达到 $\varepsilon$ 1-Wasserstein误差所需样本量仅依赖于内在维度 $k$，而非环境维度 $d$，实现近最优收敛率，显著优于受维度诅咒的现有理论保证。

Conclusion: 扩散模型能自然适应低维内在结构并处理多模态数据，为复杂高维学习任务中的成功提供了严格的理论依据。

Abstract: Score-based diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable empirical success in learning high-dimensional distributions, particularly those exhibiting low-dimensional and multi-modal structures. However, theoretical understanding of their statistical efficiency remains limited. Existing theories typically rely on strong regularity assumptions, such as uniformly bounded densities or globally smooth score functions, which fail to capture such intrinsic structures. In this work, we study the sample complexity of diffusion models for learning distributions supported on a union of low-dimensional subspaces. Assuming that the data distribution within each subspace is subgaussian, we show that diffusion models require at most $\widetilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-k \vee 2})$ samples to achieve $\varepsilon$ error in 1-Wasserstein distance, where $k$ is the intrinsic dimension. This near-optimal convergence rate depends only on the intrinsic dimension and significantly improves upon prior theoretical guarantees that suffer from the curse of dimensionality. Notably, our analysis applies to a broad collection of distributions without imposing smoothness, bounded-density, or log-concavity assumptions. Overall, our results show that diffusion models can statistically adapt to intrinsic low-dimensional structure while naturally accommodating multi-modal data, offering a rigorous theoretical justification for their success in complex high-dimensional learning tasks.

</details>


### [306] [Visual Spatial Learning: Single-Field Spatial Interpolation Using Convolutional Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30167)
*Daniel Tinoco,Raquel Menezes,Carlos Baquero,Alexandra Silva*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出基于CNN的单样本空间插值方法，无需外部数据或显式协方差建模，仅从稀疏观测中学习预测未观测点，为经典地统计方法提供了数据驱动替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典地统计方法（如Kriging）依赖高斯过程假设和变异函数建模，在非平稳场景下效果有限且需要大量领域知识。作者希望提出一种数据驱动、无需显式协方差建模的空间插值方法。

Method: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，在单个部分观测场（单一样本）上进行训练和推理。模型仅以观测位置为监督信号，学习预测用户定义网格上未观测点的值，无需外部数据或先验场。

Result: 该方法能在稀疏监督下完成单实例空间插值，灵活捕捉局部空间模式，无需变异函数估计或显式协方差建模。

Conclusion: CNN可作为经典地统计方法的实用替代方案，拓展了CNN在空间插值这一新问题领域的应用。

Abstract: Predicting a complete spatially correlated field from sparse observations is a fundamental challenge in spatial statistics and environmental modelling. Classical interpolation methods such as Kriging rely on Gaussian process assumptions and variography, which can limit their effectiveness in non-stationary settings and require substantial domain expertise. In this work, we leverage an architecture based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for spatial interpolation that is trained and applied on a single partially observed field, without access to external data or prior fields. The model is supervised directly on the observed locations and learns to predict values at unobserved points on the user defined grid. Unlike Kriging, our method does not require explicit covariance modelling or variogram estimation, and it can flexibly capture local spatial patterns in a data-driven manner. This work demonstrates the potential of CNNs for single-instance spatial interpolation under sparse supervision, offering a practical alternative to classical geostatistical methods, and extending the use of CNNs to a new problem domain.

</details>


### [307] [Wasserstein Contraction of Coordinate Ascent Variational Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30253)
*Rocco Caprio,Adrien Corenflos,Sam Power*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了坐标上升变分推断算法在Wasserstein距离下的收缩性质，证明了在固定点满足传输-信息不等式和函数光滑性条件下的收敛性，并应用于贝叶斯高斯混合模型、高维贝叶斯Probit回归及逻辑回归。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为坐标上升变分推断算法提供严格的收敛性理论分析，弥补该领域在Wasserstein距离框架下对算法收缩性理解的不足。

Method: 基于传输-信息不等式和函数光滑性条件，在Wasserstein距离下建立坐标上升变分推断算法的收缩性理论；结果适用于光滑流形及部分非光滑空间。

Result: 给出了算法在Wasserstein距离下的局部收敛保证，结果具有一般性和精确性，适用于多种概率模型。

Conclusion: 该理论框架为变分推断算法的收敛性分析提供了新视角，并展示了在经典贝叶斯模型中的有效应用。

Abstract: We study the contraction in Wasserstein distance of the coordinate ascent variational inference algorithm. This is shown to hold under a transport-information inequality at the fixed points and a functional smoothness condition. The results are general and sharp, allow for local convergence guarantees, hold for general smooth manifolds, and also in some non-smooth spaces. We consider applications to Bayesian Gaussian Mixture Models, and high-dimensional Bayesian Probit Regression, and Logistic Regression with Pólya-Gamma random variables (i.e. Jaakkola-Jordan's algorithm).

</details>


### [308] [Leave a Window Out: Modifying the Jackknife for Predictive Inference in Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30292)
*Hanyang Jiang,Rina Foygel Barber,Ashwin Pananjady,Yao Xie*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种适用于时间序列数据的留窗法（LWO），解决了标准留一法Jackknife在时间序列中覆盖失效的问题，在保证有效覆盖的同时生成比分段共形预测更窄的预测区间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共形预测方法要求数据可交换且预测器无记忆，这在时间序列场景中不成立；而分段共形预测虽稳健但样本分割导致精度下降，因此需要探索不依赖数据分割的推断方法在时间序列中的可靠性。

Method: 提出留窗法（LWO），对标准Jackknife进行改进以适应时间序列的时序依赖结构；引入循环可交换性偏离度量系数来量化数据偏离程度，并证明在模型满足稳定性的条件下LWO能保证有效覆盖。

Result: 标准留一法Jackknife在温和时间依赖的典型时间序列模型中可能遭受任意大的覆盖损失；LWO方法在实验中能实现有效覆盖，且生成区间比分段共形预测更窄。

Conclusion: LWO方法在时间序列场景中兼顾了覆盖有效性和区间效率，为不依赖数据分割的预测推断方法在时序数据中的应用提供了理论保证和实用方案。

Abstract: Conformal prediction methods enjoy strong theoretical and empirical predictive inference performance, provided the data is exchangeable, and predictors are trained in a memoryless fashion. However, these assumptions and constraints are impractical in many real-data settings, such as time series (where temporal dependence violates exchangeability, and where memoryless predictors will inevitably have poor predictive accuracy). Recent work shows that the split conformal prediction method is robust to these issues of memory-based predictors and deviations from exchangeability that are common features of time-series data. However, since using sample splitting can lead to lower accuracy, this motivates asking whether other predictive inference methods (that do not rely on data splitting) could also be reliably used in the time series setting.
  In this work, we show that the vanilla leave-one-out jackknife can suffer an arbitrary loss of coverage even in canonical time series models with mild temporal dependence. As a remedy, we propose a careful modification tailored to such settings, which we term the \emph{leave-a-window-out} (LWO) method, and show that it can achieve valid coverage provided that the model-fitting procedure satisfies mild stability properties. Our proofs are based on quantifying the degree to which the data departs from \emph{cyclic exchangeability}, and we introduce new coefficients to measure the extent of this departure. Experiments on time series data demonstrate that our LWO method often enjoys valid coverage when the vanilla jackknife fails to cover, while producing much narrower intervals than split conformal prediction.

</details>


### [309] [Improved Guarantees for Heterogeneous Treatment-Effect Estimation via Matrix Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30319)
*Anay Mehrotra,Phuc Tran,Van H. Vu,Manolis Zampetakis*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究面板数据中的异质性处理效应估计问题，提出了一种无需倾向性先验知识的计算高效方法，在低秩假设下实现了行方向上的精准误差界，填补了矩阵补全理论在逐行保证方面的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果推断主要关注平均处理效应，而实践中更需了解干预对每个个体的异质性影响。面板数据下的异质性处理效应估计可转化为矩阵补全问题，但现有矩阵补全理论仅能提供平均意义上的保证，无法给出逐行的精确误差界。

Method: 将异质性处理效应估计表述为矩阵补全问题，提出一种简单、计算高效的估计器，在标准低秩假设和正则性条件下，无需知道倾向性得分，实现行方向上的ℓ₂误差界。

Result: 在理论上建立了首个尖锐的行方向ℓ₂扰动界，达到 Õ(√(1/n + n/m²)) 的误差率，补充了现有的谱范数、Frobenius范数和逐元素扰动理论。

Conclusion: 该工作弥合了矩阵补全理论与异质性处理效应估计之间的鸿沟，为面板数据下的个体化因果推断提供了理论保证和实用工具。

Abstract: A central goal of modern causal inference is estimating heterogeneous treatment effects to answer questions like "how does an intervention affect each unit," rather than only on average. We study this problem with panel-data where we observe $n$ units across $m$ times under unknown, non-uniform treatment assignments. The data in this setting is naturally represented as a matrix of all unit--time treatment effects. Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects can then be expressed as obtaining a good estimation of each row's average in this matrix. This allows us to formulate the problem as matrix completion, which can be solved under natural low-rankness assumptions. However, existing matrix-completion guarantees are not powerful enough to get meaningful bounds for the per-row guarantee required for estimating the heterogeneous treatment effect; roughly speaking, they are only useful for estimating average treatment effect bounds, as also illustrated in a recent line of work. We give a simple, computationally efficient estimator that, without knowledge of the propensities and under standard low-rankness and regularity assumptions, achieves a row-wise $\ell_2$ error of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{\frac{1}{n} + \frac{n}{m^2}})$. Technically, our analysis establishes the first sharp row-wise $\ell_2$-perturbation bound for low-rank approximation, complementing existing spectral-, Frobenius-, and entrywise perturbation theory.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.PM'></div>

# q-fin.PM [[Back]](#toc)

### [310] [From Classical Optimization to Bayesian Integration: A Comprehensive Analysis of Systematic Portfolio Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29413)
*Ajay Kumar Verma,Shravya Barkam*

Main category: q-fin.PM

TL;DR: 本文比较了均值-方差优化、约束优化、Fama-French五因子回归、蒙特卡洛模拟和Black-Litterman模型五种投资组合构建方法，以10只美股（2023.09-2025.12）为样本，分析了各方法对投资组合配置、表现和稳定性的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 比较多种当代投资组合构建方法在实际美股市场中的表现差异，探究不同方法（约束条件、风险因子、模拟近似、市场观点）对投资组合配置、绩效和稳定性的影响。

Method: 采用10只美股（TSLA, WMT, BAC, GS, LLY, MRK, GOOG, META, AAPL, XOM）在2023年9月至2025年12月的数据，分别应用均值-方差优化、约束优化、Fama-French五因子回归、蒙特卡洛模拟和Black-Litterman模型进行投资组合构建与比较。

Result: 标准优化导致高度集中的投资组合；约束优化通过改变有效边界改变分配；五因子模型支持防御性大价值盈利风格；高模拟次数的蒙特卡洛在盒约束下可行；Black-Litterman比标准均值-方差产生更经济直观且更稳定的配置。

Conclusion: 不同的投资组合构建方法在配置集中度、风险暴露、稳定性和经济直觉性上存在显著差异，Black-Litterman模型在平衡均衡收益与投资者观点方面表现最优。

Abstract: This paper compares a series of contemporary portfolio construction approaches by employing ten U.S. stocks (TSLA, WMT, BAC, GS, LLY, MRK, GOOG, META, AAPL and XOM) in a time frame from September 2023 to December 2025. The paper explores both basic mean-variance optimization, constrained optimization, Fama French five factor regression modeling, Monte Carlo simulation, and the Black-Litterman model to determine how constraints to a solution, risk factors to a strategy, simulated approximations, and specific market views may all impact the outcome of portfolio allocation, performance and stability. Overall, the results show that standard optimization may result in highly concentrated portfolios, while constrained optimization leads to changes in portfolio allocations by altering the efficient frontier, five factor regression models suggest that a basic investment style of defensive large value and profitability exposure, Monte Carlo approximation is a viable technique to arrive at mean-variance optimal portfolios provided the simulations are high enough especially under a box constraint, the Black Litterman portfolio approach produces more economically intuitive allocations and greater stability compared to standard mean-variance optimization as the approach balances equilibrium returns with investor views.

</details>


### [311] [Financially Guided Deep Portfolio Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28853)
*Rahul Fernandes,Travis Desell*

Main category: q-fin.PM

TL;DR: 本文提出一个端到端投资组合优化框架，通过可微的金融指标代理损失函数（夏普比率、Omega比率、CVaR、风险平价）直接训练神经网络，在2007-2023年50只S&P 500股票上，2022-2023年测试期最佳模型（AttentionLSTM + Omega-CVaR-RiskParity损失）实现了年化夏普0.29、总回报+7.86%，超越S&P 500约12.38个百分点，相对改进超270%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统"预测-再优化"方法会累积预测误差，且在市场机制转换时表现不佳，需要一种直接针对金融指标优化的端到端框架。

Method: 提出可微的金融指标代理损失函数（夏普比率、Omega比率、CVaR、风险平价），使用AttentionLSTM等神经网络通过反向传播直接学习投资组合权重，采用滚动窗口向前验证，并加入真实买卖价差成本。

Result: 2022-2023年测试期：最佳模型（AttentionLSTM + Omega-CVaR-RiskParity损失）年化夏普0.29，总回报+7.86%，超越S&P 500的-4.52%总回报和-0.02年化夏普，相对改进超270%，且尾部风险(CVaR)几乎不变。

Conclusion: 将金融目标直接嵌入模型训练能够在逆境市场中产生稳健且具有经济意义的超额收益，持续优于等权组合、S&P 500及传统方法（MVP、HRP、NCO）。

Abstract: Portfolio optimization in real-world financial markets is notoriously difficult due to non-stationarity, noisy data, and high transaction costs. Standard predict-then-optimize methods first forecast returns and then solve for weights, compounding prediction errors and often failing under regime shifts. We propose an end-to-end framework that directly optimizes differentiable surrogates of key financial metrics - Sharpe ratio, Omega ratio, Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR), and Risk Parity - allowing neural networks to learn portfolio weights via backpropagation. Our expanding-window walk-forward procedure, applied to 50 S&P 500 stocks from 2007 to 2023, incorporates realistic bid-ask spread costs and rebalances quarterly. On the challenging out-of-sample test period (2022-2023), the best model - an AttentionLSTM with the Omega-CVaR-RiskParity loss - achieves an annualized Sharpe of 0.29 and a total compounded return of +7.86%, while the S&P 500 delivers -4.52% total return and an annualized Sharpe of -0.02. This outperforms the S&P 500 by 12.38 percentage points (a relative improvement of over 270%), while keeping tail risk (CVaR) nearly unchanged. The framework consistently outperforms the equal-weight portfolio, S&P 500, and traditional methods (MVP, HRP, NCO), demonstrating that embedding financial objectives directly into model training yields robust, economically meaningful outperformance even in adverse market conditions.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [312] [Saddle Networks: Structure-Preserving Architectures for Convex-Concave Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28894)
*Xavier Warin*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种保持凸-凹几何结构的鞍点网络架构，通过结构化可分离分解和混合Monge型凸性条件，实现了对凸-凹函数的高精度逼近，并在1维和5维数值实验中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 鞍点模型在优化、最优传输、鲁棒学习和控制等领域广泛应用，保持函数在x方向凸、y方向凹的几何结构对于获得可处理的min-max问题和可靠保证至关重要。

Method: 提出保持凸-凹几何的结构化可分离分解，证明混合Monge型凸性条件下的完整一维逼近定理；设计仅需凸性保持神经网络和简单输出变换（强制符号和凹性约束）的鞍点网络架构。

Result: 在1维和5维数值实验中，所提鞍点网络在光滑、非光滑和高阶凸-凹测试函数上均达到高精度。

Conclusion: 所提出的架构能够有效保持凸-凹几何结构，对各类凸-凹函数实现高精度逼近，具有良好的实用性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Saddle-point models arise throughout optimization, optimal transport, robust learning, and control. In many applications, the relevant function f(x,y) is convex in x and concave in y, and preserving this geometry is essential for obtaining tractable min--max formulations and reliable certificates. We introduce a structured separable decomposition that preserves the convex-concave geometry and prove a complete one-dimensional approximation theorem under a mixed Monge-type convexity condition. We then describe practical saddle network architectures that preserve convexity in x and concavity in y by construction. The proposed architectures require only convexity-preserving neural networks, together with simple output transformations enforcing sign and concavity constraints. Finally, we report numerical benchmarks in dimension 1 and 5, showing that the proposed saddle networks achieve high accuracy on smooth, nonsmooth, and high-rank convex--concave test functions.

</details>


### [313] [Manifold-based Algorithms for the Hadamard Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28980)
*Nicolas Gillis,Subhayan Saha,Stefano Sicilia,Arnaud Vandaele*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对Hadamard分解（HD）问题——将矩阵X近似分解为两个低秩矩阵X₁和X₂的逐元素乘积——提出了理论分析和三种新算法，其中两种特别适用于大规模稀疏数据，并引入了新的初始化策略提升精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准低秩近似（如截断SVD）表达能力有限，而HD通过Hadamard乘积能表示更高秩的矩阵（秩可达r₁r₂），用相同参数数量获得更强表达能力。

Method: 1）提出理论重写X≈WHᵀ，其中W、H有r₁r₂列且位于特定流形上；2）基于此设计三种算法：基于Manopt的流形优化、块投影梯度法、无需投影的流形梯度下降法；3）提出新的初始化策略。

Result: 数值实验表明，新算法在合成数据和真实数据上均高效且具有竞争力，优于截断SVD和现有方法。

Conclusion: Hadamard分解比传统低秩近似更具表达能力，所提算法（尤其后两种）能有效处理大规模稀疏数据，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Given a matrix $X$, and two ranks $r_1$ and $r_2$, the Hadamard decomposition (HD) looks for two low-rank matrices, $X_1$ of rank $r_1$ and $X_2$ of rank $r_2$, both of the same size as $X$, such that $X\approx X_1\circ X_2$, where $\circ$ is the Hadamard (element-wise) product. In most cases, HD is more expressive than standard low-rank approximations such as the truncated singular value decomposition (TSVD), as it can represent higher-rank matrices with the same number of parameters; this is because the rank of $X_1 \circ X_2$ is generically equal to $r_1 r_2$. In this paper, we first present some theoretical insights for HD, in particular a useful reformulation $X\approx WH^\top$ where $W$ and $H$ have $r_1 r_2$ columns and belong to certain manifolds. These allow us to develop three new algorithms for computing HD. The first one uses the representation $X\approx X_1\circ X_2$ and relies on the Manopt toolbox. The other two rely on the reformulation $X\approx WH^\top$: one is a block projected gradient method, and the other is a manifold-based gradient descent algorithm that does not require projection onto the feasible set. The last two algorithms are particularly effective for handling large sparse data. We also propose new initializations that allow us to improve the accuracy of the HD. We compare our algorithms and initialization strategies with the TSVD and with the state of the art. Numerical results show that the new methods are efficient and competitive on both synthetic and real data.

</details>


### [314] [An existence result for a quantitative isoperimetric inequality in $\mathbb{R}^3$ involving the Hausdorff asymmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29046)
*Silvio Bove,Gisella Croce,Giovanni Pisante*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了三维欧氏空间中包含Hausdorff不对称性的定量等周比$\mathcal{Q}_*$，证明了在固定体积的凸体类$\mathcal{A}$上，$\mathcal{Q}_*$能达到其最小值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索包含Hausdorff不对称性的定量等周比是否存在优化元（即最小值点），这是经典等周问题的推广与深化。

Method: 通过分析三维空间中凸体集合上的定量等周比$\mathcal{Q}_*$，利用变分法和凸几何工具，证明其在固定体积约束下的最小值存在性。

Result: 证明了$\mathcal{Q}_*$在固定体积的凸体类$\mathcal{A}$上能够达到其最小值。

Conclusion: 该包含Hausdorff不对称性的定量等周比在三维凸体类中存在优化元，这为等周不等式及相关几何优化问题提供了新的理论结果。

Abstract: We study the existence of an optimizer for a quantitative isoperimetric ratio $\mathcal{Q}_*$ in $\mathbb{R}^3$ involving the Hausdorff asymmetry. We prove that $\mathcal{Q}_*$ attains its minimum over the class $\mathcal{A}$ of convex bodies of fixed volume.

</details>


### [315] [Improving depth-resolution, in-plane contrast, and reducing non-uniformity artifacts for wide-angle DBT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29133)
*Emil Y. Sidky,Adrian A. Sanchez,John Paul Phillips,Zheng Zhang,Dan Xia,Ingrid S. Reiser,Xiaochuan Pan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对宽角数字乳腺断层合成（DBT）提出了一种两阶段稀疏正则化迭代重建算法，通过在第一阶段引入“背景”图像估计来吸收低频伪影，从而改善深度分辨率和平面内对比度，同时减少图像非均匀性伪影。初步病例结果显示了算法设计目标的达成，但仍需更多实验和任务评估来验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有宽角DBT图像重建存在深度分辨率不足、平面内对比度差以及图像非均匀性伪影等问题，需要开发改进的重建算法。

Method: 该算法是在先前稀疏正则化迭代重建工作基础上的扩展，采用两阶段策略：第一阶段进行低分辨率重建以利用稀疏性保证定量精度，并新增了“背景”图像估计来吸收导致图像非均匀性的低频伪影。

Result: 在宽角DBT系统采集的病例数据上进行了演示，初步结果表明算法设计目标已达成。

Conclusion: 虽然单病例结果令人鼓舞，但需要更多的实证结果和基于任务的评估来强化结论的可靠性。

Abstract: Purpose: This work aims to develop an image reconstruction algorithm for wide-angle digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) that has improved depth resolution and in-plane contrast while reducing non-uniformity artifacts. Approach: The image reconstruction algorithm is an extension of our prior work on sparsity-regularized iterative image reconstruction. The algorithm is performed in two stages as explained in a prior work. The first stage consists of a low-resolution reconstruction that exploits sparsity for quantitative accuracy. In this work, this first stage is augmented with a formulation that includes the estimation of a "background" image, which absorbs low-frequency artifacts that cause image non-uniformity. Results: The new algorithm is demonstrated on a patient case for which the data are acquired on a wide-angle DBT system. Conclusion: The results on the shown case indicate that the algorithm design goals have been met, but additional empirical results and task-based assessment are needed to strengthen this conclusion.

</details>


### [316] [Restarted Accelerated Primal-Dual Algorithms with Adaptive Stepsizes for Nonlinear Conic Constrained Convex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29291)
*Necdet Serhat Aybat,Jinxin Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种带重启机制的加速原始-对偶算法（rAPDB），用于求解凸非线性锥规划（如QCQP），该算法采用（非单调）自适应回溯步长搜索，仅需一阶信息，在度量次正则性条件下建立了全局线性收敛性，并通过GPU加速实现了良好的实际性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的原始-对偶方法大多针对双线性耦合问题设计，而凸非线性锥规划（如QCQP）的极小极大重构包含非双线性耦合项，现有方法无法直接适用。因此需要开发新的自适应算法来处理这种局部曲率变化的问题。

Method: 基于加速原始-对偶方法和自适应步长搜索，分别设计了固定频率和自适应两种重启机制，并结合单调与非单调自适应步长搜索策略。算法仅需一阶信息和矩阵-向量乘积，适合大规模GPU加速实现。

Result: 在KKT映射的度量次正则性条件下，证明了自中心平滑对偶间隙的二次增长性质，并建立了重启方法的全局线性收敛性。给出了度量次正则性在一般非凸问题上的充分条件。数值实验表明，非单调自适应步长结合GPU加速性能优异。

Conclusion: 提出的rAPDB方法有效解决了非双线性耦合的凸非线性锥规划问题，理论证明和数值实验均验证了方法的有效性，尤其非单调自适应步长和GPU加速带来了显著的实践优势。

Abstract: We propose restarted accelerated primal-dual algorithms with (non-monotone) backtracking (rAPDB) for convex nonlinear conic programs, with quadratically constrained quadratic programs (QCQPs) as a special case. Unlike linear and quadratic programs, these problems give rise to convex-concave minimax reformulations with non-bilinear coupling terms; therefore, the existing primal-dual methods for bilinear couplings are not applicable. To address this challenge, we build on the accelerated primal-dual method with adaptive stepsize search -- as it adapts to the local curvature -- and develop both fixed-frequency and adaptive restart schemes, incorporating both monotone and non-monotone adaptive step-size search strategies. The resulting algorithms require only first-order information and matrix-vector products, making them suitable for large-scale and GPU-accelerated implementation. Under metric subregularity of the KKT mapping, we prove a quadratic growth property for a self-centered smoothed duality gap and establish global linear convergence of the proposed restarted methods. We also establish sufficient conditions under which the metric subregularity holds even for general nonconvex problems over convex polyhedral cones. These results are new and may be of independent interest. Numerical experiments on random QCQPs and kernel matrix learning instances show that the proposed methods, especially with non-monotone adaptive stepsizes and GPU acceleration, achieve strong practical performance.

</details>


### [317] [Global optimization of quadratic root-difference minimization under elliptic annulus constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29294)
*Meijia Yang,Yong Xia*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究椭圆环约束下的非凸二次根差最小化问题，通过建立Annulus Brickman定理将其等价转化为二维凸问题，并提出基于Frank-Wolfe算法的IMGE方法，利用子问题解直接作为原问题的近似解，避免了昂贵的解恢复过程，在大规模问题上显著优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非凸二次根差最小化问题在椭圆环约束下求解困难，现有方法计算成本高，尤其在大规模问题中表现不佳，亟需高效且全局可解的算法。

Method: 首先建立Annulus Brickman定理，将原始非凸问题等价转化为2维凸问题(HP)；然后采用Frank-Wolfe算法求解该凸问题，并证明Frank-Wolfe子问题的解是原始问题的O(1/√k)近似解，从而无需额外的解恢复步骤；基于此恢复无关特性，提出IMGE算法进行全局求解。

Result: 理论上证明了Frank-Wolfe子问题解作为原始问题近似解的收敛率；数值实验表明IMGE算法收敛迅速，在大规模问题上显著优于传统方法。

Conclusion: 本文通过将非凸问题转化为凸问题并利用Frank-Wolfe算法的副产品作为主输出，提出了一种高效、可扩展的全局求解方法，为类似非凸优化问题提供了新的思路。

Abstract: This paper studies the nonconvex quadratic root-difference minimization under elliptic annulus constraints {\rm (QR)}. We first establish the Annulus Brickman theorem and equivalently reformulate {\rm (QR)} as a 2-dimensional convex problem {\rm (HP)} with hidden variables. We employ the Frank-Wolfe algorithm to globally solve {\rm (HP)}. A key finding is that the solutions of the Frank-Wolfe subproblems, which are traditionally viewed as mere auxiliary updates, are proven to be $O(1/\sqrt{k})$-approximate solutions of the original problem {\rm (QR)}. This transforms an algorithmic by-product into the primary output and completely bypasses the need to solve the computationally expensive quadratic system required for solution recovery. Leveraging this recovery-free property, we develop the efficient Iterative Minimum Generalized Eigenpair (IMGE) algorithm for globally solving {\rm (QR)}. Numerical experiments confirm that IMGE converges rapidly and significantly outperforms conventional methods, especially for large-scale problems.

</details>


### [318] [Kernel-based potential mean-field games with unbiased random Fourier $U$-statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29371)
*Yumiharu Nakano*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类势均值场博弈问题，其中运行交互成本和终端目标成本均通过再生核最大均值差异（MMD）惩罚项表示，并提出了一种利用核结构的计算框架。该框架采用随机傅里叶U统计量对有限样本经验分布进行无偏估计，计算复杂度与批量大小呈线性关系。漂移项由神经网络参数化，通过随机梯度下降训练。作者证明了样本级几乎必然收敛定理及其显式收敛速率，并给出了惩罚参数、随机特征数、样本量和优化容差之间的耦合率条件。该方法涵盖了核MMD惩罚的薛定谔桥问题作为特例。数值实验验证了该方法在高达100维的薛定谔桥问题以及电动汽车充电协调问题上的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有均值场博弈模型在处理高阶矩或复杂分布匹配时存在计算瓶颈，特别是当交互成本和终端成本需要从有限样本中估计时。作者希望利用再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）和MMD的良好统计性质，设计一个计算高效且理论有保证的框架，以处理高维、异构智能体系统的均值场博弈问题。

Method: 1) 将势均值场博弈中的交互成本和终端成本均建模为再生核MMD惩罚项；2) 采用随机傅里叶特征将核函数映射到有限维空间，结合U统计量对MMD进行无偏估计，实现线性计算复杂度；3) 使用神经网络参数化受控扩散的漂移项，通过随机梯度下降训练；4) 建立耦合率条件下的几乎必然收敛性分析，给出显式收敛速率。

Result: 1) 证明了样本级几乎必然收敛定理及显式收敛速率，需满足惩罚参数、随机特征数、样本量和优化容差之间的耦合率条件；2) 在高达100维的薛定谔桥问题上验证了方法的可扩展性；3) 在电动汽车充电协调问题中展示了方法对异构智能体（不同车辆参数）和聚合需求拥堵成本的建模能力。

Conclusion: 该框架为核MMD惩罚的势均值场博弈提供了一种理论有保证且计算高效的求解方案，特别适合高维分布匹配和异构智能体系统。薛定谔桥问题和电动汽车充电问题的数值实验表明，该方法具有良好的可扩展性和实用性，为实际大规模智能体协调控制提供了新工具。

Abstract: We study the subclass of potential mean-field games in which the running interaction cost and the terminal target cost are both expressed through reproducing-kernel maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) penalties, and develop a computational framework that exploits this kernel structure. Both costs are estimated from finite-sample empirical distributions using a random Fourier U-statistic representation that is unbiased and has linear cost in the batch size. The drift of the controlled diffusion is parametrized by a neural network and trained via stochastic gradient descent. For this subclass we prove a sample-level almost-sure convergence theorem and an explicit almost-sure rate of convergence, under coupled rate conditions on the penalty parameter, the random-feature count, the sample size, and the optimization tolerance. The framework includes the kernel-MMD-penalty Schrödinger bridge problem as the special case of a vanishing interaction cost. Numerical experiments illustrate the method on the Schrödinger bridge problem in dimensions up to one hundred, and on an electric vehicle charging coordination problem with per-vehicle physical heterogeneity, where an aggregate-demand congestion cost represents price-feedback competition at the population level and the terminal MMD penalty shapes the state-of-charge distribution at the deadline.

</details>


### [319] [MoSSP: A Momentum-Based Single-Loop Stochastic Penalty Method for Nonconvex Constrained DC-Regularized Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29635)
*Luxuan Li,Chunfeng Cui,Xiao Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出MoSSP算法，一种用于非凸约束DC随机优化的单循环随机惩罚方法，实现了O(ε⁻⁴)和O(ε⁻³)的预言复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单循环算法能高效处理无约束DC优化，但在带非凸约束的DC优化问题上潜力尚未被探索，维持可行性同时获得良好预言复杂度是核心挑战。

Method: 对惩罚函数的Moreau包络加上凸DC部分应用单步随机近端梯度，同时并行计算凹部分的近端映射；给出Polyak动量版(O(ε⁻⁴))和递归动量版(O(ε⁻³))两种变体。

Result: Polyak动量版本达到O(ε⁻⁴)的随机ε-KKT点预言复杂度，递归动量版本改进至O(ε⁻³)，实验验证了有效性。

Conclusion: MoSSP成功填补了带非凸约束DC随机优化中单循环算法的空白，通过动量机制显著提升了复杂度上界，为实际应用提供了理论保障。

Abstract: In this paper, we study a structured class of nonconvex constrained stochastic problems with difference-of-convex (DC) regularization, where the feasible set is possibly nonconvex and the concave part of the DC regularizer is allowed to be nonsmooth. The fundamental challenge lies in maintaining feasibility for nonconvex constraints while achieving favorable oracle complexity. Although single-loop algorithms efficiently solve unconstrained DC optimization problems, their potential for constrained optimization with DC structure remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we develop MoSSP, a Momentum-based Single-loop Stochastic Penalty method for such problems with provable complexity guarantees. The key idea is to apply a single stochastic proximal-gradient step to the Moreau envelope of the penalty plus the convex DC part, with the concave part's proximal mapping computed in parallel. We derive two algorithm variants: a Polyak-momentum version with $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$ oracle complexity for finding stochastic $\varepsilon$-KKT points, and an improved $O(\varepsilon^{-3})$ version incorporating recursive momentum. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms.

</details>


### [320] [Solving mathematical programs with complementarity constraints by disjunctive regularizations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29757)
*Sebastian Lämmel,Vladimir Shikhman*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于互补约束数学规划(MPCC)的新析取正则化方法，该方法在可行集上与Kanzow-Schwartz正则化一致，但具有更好的约束规格保持性和收敛性质，数值表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MPCC正则化方法（如Kanzow-Schwartz、Scholtes等）在约束规格保持、收敛性质或数值精度方面存在不足，需要一种既能保持良好理论性质又能提升数值性能的新正则化策略。

Method: 利用逻辑OR操作符和等价的max型约束构造析取正则化，替代Kanzow-Schwartz正则化的函数描述方式，保留其可行集的同时改善约束规格的保持性。

Result: 1) 析取正则化在原始MPCC满足LICQ时也能保持LICQ；2) 收敛到S-稳定点不需要二阶必要条件；3) C-指标的二次数值和双活动部分在正则化下具有一般性对应关系；4) 数值实验表明其性能优于Kanzow-Schwartz正则化，高精度下甚至优于Scholtes正则化。

Conclusion: 析取正则化在理论和数值两方面均优于Kanzow-Schwartz正则化，且在高精度求解MPCC时比Scholtes正则化更具优势，是一种有前景的MPCC正则化方法。

Abstract: We propose a new disjunctive regularization for mathematical programs with complementarity constraints (MPCC). Its feasible set coincides with that of the Kanzow-Schwartz regularization. However, their functional descriptions differ considerably. For the disjunctive regularization, the logical operator OR and equivalent max-type constraints are used. Unlike the Kanzow-Schwartz, the disjunctive regularization satisfies the tailored linear independence constraint qualification if the original MPCC does. More than that, the favorable convergence properties - known to hold for the Kanzow-Schwartz regularization - remain valid for the disjunctive regularization as well. In particular, no second order necessary conditions are required to guarantee convergence towards S-stationary points of MPCC. Additionally, we keep track of the topological type of approximating and limiting nondegenerate C-stationary points in terms of their C-indices. Quadratic and biactive parts of the C-indices are shown to generically correspond to each other while regularizing. This is a new phenomenon as compared to the Scholtes or sign-type regularizations studied before. Numerical experiments illustrate that the proposed disjunctive regularization clearly outperforms the Kanzow-Schwartz regularization. Its numerical performance is even better than that of the Scholtes regularization if solving MPCCs with high accuracy.

</details>


### [321] [Local Differential Privacy via Dynamic Quantization in Distributed Online Stochastic Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29845)
*Zhiguo Zhang,Cheng Kui,Qian Ma,Dongrui Wu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于动态随机量化器的本地差分隐私分布式在线随机优化算法，首次在带隐私保护的分布式在线优化中同时实现精确收敛和有向图上的严格本地差分隐私。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决分布式在线随机优化中信息交换导致隐私泄露的问题，现有方法在精确收敛与隐私保护之间难以兼顾，且多局限于无向图场景。

Method: 设计动态随机量化器对通信前的信息进行掩蔽，实现(0, δ^i)-本地差分隐私；算法完全分布式，适用于有向图交互网络。

Result: 理论证明算法几乎必然收敛到最优解，且在迭代次数趋于无穷时仍能保证每个智能体的(0, δ^i)-本地差分隐私；在蘑菇分类、手写数字识别和脑机接口数据集上的数值实验验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 这是首个利用量化效应在有向图上同时实现精确收敛与严格本地差分隐私的分布式在线随机优化工作。

Abstract: Distributed online stochastic optimization has received extensive attention in large-scale distributed learning and other related fields due to its unique advantage in processing streaming data. However, information exchange through the communication network during the optimization process may lead to privacy leakage. To address this issue, this paper proposes a locally differentially private distributed online stochastic optimization algorithm that employs an elaborately designed dynamic stochastic quantizer to mask the exchanged information prior to communication. Theoretical analysis shows that the proposed algorithm not only converges almost surely to the optimal solution but also achieves $(0,δ^i)$-local differential privacy for each agent $i$ even when the number of iterations tends to infinity. Furthermore, the algorithm is fully distributed and applicable to scenarios where the interaction network among agents is a directed graph. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on distributed online stochastic optimization that simultaneously achieves exact convergence and rigorous local differential privacy over a directed graph by exploiting quantization effects. Numerical experiments of distributed online training on the mushroom classification dataset, handwritten digits recognition dataset, and brain-computer interface dataset verify the effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [322] [Mean Field Competition of Optimal Switching: The Vanishing Entropy Regularization Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29892)
*Zongxia Liang,Shu Wang,Xiang Yu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了一种基于排名的平均场博弈，其中竞争性代理在多个努力区间之间进行策略性切换。通过引入熵正则化的辅助问题，将切换决策随机化为连续时间有限状态马尔可夫链的转移概率控制，证明了正则化均衡的存在性、唯一性（在凸收益方案下），并通过虚构博弈迭代进行逼近。当正则化消失时，正则化均衡收敛到原始最优切换MFG的松弛均衡，且在严格凸收益方案下得到总体排名分布的唯一性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究竞争性代理在多个努力区间之间策略性切换的排名型平均场博弈问题，旨在解决这类复杂博弈中均衡的存在性、唯一性及数值逼近问题。

Method: 引入熵正则化辅助问题，将切换决策随机化为连续时间有限状态马尔可夫链的转移概率控制；利用虚构博弈迭代方案逼近均衡；通过正则化消失时的收敛分析连接正则化均衡与原始MFG的松弛均衡。

Result: 证明了正则化均衡的存在性；在凸收益方案下得到唯一性；建立了虚构博弈迭代的逼近性；证明了正则化均衡向松弛均衡的收敛性；在严格凸收益方案下得到总体排名分布的唯一性。

Conclusion: 熵正则化方法能有效处理排名型平均场博弈中的最优切换问题，正则化均衡在消失时收敛到原始问题的松弛均衡，且收益方案的凸性对均衡唯一性至关重要。

Abstract: This paper studies a type of rank-based mean field game in which competing agents strategically switch among multiple effort regimes. We propose an entropy regularized auxiliary problem where the switching decisions are randomized to the control of transition probability for a continuous-time finite-state Markov chain. We first establish the existence of regularized equilibrium in this auxiliary problem. Assuming the convexity of reward scheme, we then prove that the equilibrium is unique and can be approximated by a fictitious play iteration scheme. Furthermore, as the entropy regularization vanishes, we establish the convergence analysis of the regularized equilibrium towards the relaxed equilibrium in the original MFG of optimal switching. The uniqueness of the population ranking distribution under the relaxed equilibrium is also obtained given a strictly convex reward scheme.

</details>


### [323] [A New Constraint Qualification for Continuous-Time Nonlinear Programming Based on Asymptotic KKT Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29898)
*Rodrigo B. Moreira,Moisés R. C. do Monte,Valeriano A. de Oliveira*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的约束规范（AKKT-正则性），使得满足AKKT最优性条件的候选解能够达到与经典KKT条件相同的精度，且该约束规范是最弱可能的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AKKT条件无需约束规范即可成立，但其不够稳健，产生的候选解有时甚至不是驻点。因此需要一种方法来精炼候选解集，使其与经典KKT条件具有同等精度。

Method: 通过引入一种新的约束规范——AKKT-正则性，在该规范下证明每个局部最优解都满足KKT条件。

Result: 在AKKT-正则性下，每个局部最优解都满足KKT条件；且该约束规范是保证该性质的最弱可能条件；还给出了其适用的充分条件。

Conclusion: AKKT-正则性为连接AKKT条件与经典KKT条件提供了桥梁，以最弱的约束规范确保了候选解的精炼。

Abstract: The asymptotic Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (AKKT) optimality conditions are distinguished from other approaches in the literature by virtue of their capacity to be effectively derived through numerical methods, such as the utilization of an appropriate version of the augmented Lagrange method. These tools are of a theoretical nature, yet they possess practical utility in the identification of candidate solutions to continuous-time programming problems. While this type of optimality condition is valid without imposing any constraint qualification, it is not sufficiently robust to generate good candidate solutions. In some cases, solutions satisfying AKKT conditions are not even stationary. In this study, we investigate conditions that effectively refine this set of candidate solutions with the same precision as the classical Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions. This is achieved by introducing a novel constraint qualification, designated AKKT-regularity. It has been demonstrated that, under AKKT-regularity, each local optimal solution is shown to satisfy the KKT conditions. In addition, it is demonstrated that this constraint qualification is the weakest possible to ensure such a property. Furthermore, sufficient conditions are provided for its applicability.

</details>


### [324] [Accelerating Sinkhorn for Entropy-Regularized Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30267)
*Zeyi Xu,Long Chen*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: Acc-Sinkhorn是一种加速的Sinkhorn算法变体，用于熵正则化最优传输。它通过双层优化视角推导，保持Sinkhorn的缩放形式和每步计算成本，在可验证稳定性条件下达到$\mathcal{O}(1/k^2)$收敛率，对未正则化OT的$\varepsilon$-近似复杂度为$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^2/\varepsilon)$，在实验中实现10-30倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Sinkhorn算法收敛较慢（$\mathcal{O}(1/k)$），对未正则化最优传输问题的$\varepsilon$-近似复杂度为$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^2/\varepsilon^2)$，需要加速以满足实际应用需求。

Method: 从双层优化视角出发：Sinkhorn行缩放精确求解内变量$u$，定义简化对偶目标$f(v)=\min_u F(u,v)$；列缩放是单位步长对偶镜像下降步骤。利用这一结构引入Hessian驱动的Nesterov加速，仅使用Sinkhorn迭代的外推组合，保持缩放形式和每步计算成本不变。

Result: 在可验证稳定性条件下达到$\mathcal{O}(1/k^2)$收敛率；对未正则化OT的$\varepsilon$-近似复杂度为$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^2/\varepsilon)$，优于Sinkhorn的$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^2/\varepsilon^2)$；在合成问题、颜色迁移和词对齐任务上，小正则化参数下实现10-30倍加速。

Conclusion: Acc-Sinkhorn在保持Sinkhorn简单性和计算效率的同时，显著提升了收敛速度，为熵正则化最优传输提供了一种高效实用的加速方案。

Abstract: We propose Acc-Sinkhorn, a simple accelerated variant of Sinkhorn for entropy-regularized optimal transport (EOT). The method is derived from a bilevel optimization view: Sinkhorn row scaling solves the inner variable $u$ exactly and defines the reduced dual objective $f(v)=\min_u F(u,v)$, while the remaining column scaling is a unit-step dual mirror descent step in $v$. This structure yields a Hessian-driven Nesterov acceleration that keeps Sinkhorn's scaling form and per-iteration cost, using only extrapolated combinations of Sinkhorn iterates. We prove an $\mathcal{O}(1/k^2)$ rate under a verifiable stability condition. For an $\varepsilon$-approximation of unregularized OT, the resulting complexity is $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^2/\varepsilon)$, improved from $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^2/\varepsilon^2)$ for Sinkhorn. On synthetic problems, color transfer, and word alignment, Acc-Sinkhorn gives a $10\times$--$30\times$ speedup over Sinkhorn at small regularization.

</details>


### [325] [Proper efficiency results in vector optimisation in real linear-topological spaces based on vectorial penalisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30286)
*Paul Schmölling,Christian Günther,Christiane Tammer,Elisabeth Köbis*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究约束和无约束向量优化问题中适当有效解集之间的关系，采用向量惩罚方法，在目标函数满足锥凸性假设的条件下进行理论分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究约束与无约束向量优化问题中适当有效解集之间的关系，这是优化理论中一个基础但重要的理论问题。

Method: 采用向量惩罚方法（vectorial penalisation approach），在目标函数满足锥凸性假设的条件下，分析约束与无约束问题之间适当有效解集的关系。

Result: 建立了在锥凸性假设下，约束和无约束向量优化问题中适当有效解集之间的理论联系。

Conclusion: 向量惩罚方法能有效建立约束与无约束向量优化问题中适当有效解集之间的关系，为处理实际约束优化问题提供理论基础。

Abstract: In this paper, we are dealing with constrained vector optimisation problems where the objective function acts between real linear-topological spaces. Our aim is to study the relationships between the sets of properly efficient solutions to constrained and unconstrained vector optimisation problems under certain cone convexity assumptions on the objective function using a vectorial penalisation approach.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [326] [Political Neutrality as Balanced Approval: A Large-Scale Human Evaluation of AI Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28911)
*Jonathan Stray,David Zhai Yang,Steven Luo,Miu Nicole Takagi,Serina Chang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于政治理论的AI政治中立性定义，并通过大规模用户研究（7,434名参与者，208,152次评估）构建了PARETO数据集，发现AI回复可以实现跨对立阵营的高认可度，但默认回复存在政治倾向偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统越来越影响用户政治观点，亟需一个严格、可实证检验的AI政治中立性定义与评估标准。

Method: 提出基于"最大化跨对立阵营认可度并平衡两组认可度"的中立性定义；从Reddit收集争议性政治问题作为prompt；招募7,434名参与者对GPT、Gemini、Claude、Llama、Grok等模型的回复进行208,152次评估。

Result: 1）AI回复可以实现对立双方均认可的高通过率；2）GPT、Gemini、Claude、Llama默认回复偏自由派，Grok无此倾向；3）政治性强的prompt比中性prompt更难处理。

Conclusion: 该工作提供了AI政治中立性的严格定义和基准测试，以及PARETO数据集作为评估进展的度量工具。

Abstract: As AI systems increasingly shape political views, defining and evaluating AI political neutrality is an urgent problem. Here, we propose a new definition of AI political neutrality and design a large-scale user study to test it, releasing a new dataset PARETO with 7,434 participants and 208,152 evaluations of AI responses. Our definition follows a simple principle grounded in political theory: when asked about a controversial issue, an AI model should generate responses that maximize approval across groups with opposing viewpoints, while balancing approval between groups. This definition allows empirical testing of whether an AI response is "neutral" and generalizes to any political context without pre-supposing a single left-right axis of division. We construct a benchmark of controversial U.S. issues, with prompts sourced from politically charged questions on Reddit and responses from frontier AI models, and recruit human participants to rate AI responses. Across all 20 issues, we find that it is possible for AI responses to achieve high rates of approval on both sides, even as those sides disagree strongly with each other on the substance of the issues. We also find that default responses lean liberal for GPT, Gemini, Claude, and Llama, but not Grok, and that user prompts with political charges are harder to respond to than neutral prompts. This work introduces a rigorous definition and benchmark of AI political neutrality, and a dataset to measure progress toward it.

</details>


### [327] [Does Distributed Training Undermine Compute Governance?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29359)
*Robi Rahman*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文探讨了前沿AI训练中的分布式计算如何规避算力治理，并提出了包括举报、芯片追踪、法务会计和集群阈值在内的反制措施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算力治理假设前沿AI训练需要大型可检测的集群，但分布式训练的进展使得开发者可能通过聚合分散硬件逃避监管，因此需要研究规避可行性和设计反制措施。

Method: 通过分析分布式训练算法对算力治理的规避可行性，评估现有监管漏洞，并提出多种反制措施（举报机制、芯片追踪、法务会计、内存与算力阈值）。

Result: 发现分布式训练确实可能规避现有算力治理框架，需结合技术、制度和法务手段进行综合防范。

Conclusion: 算力治理必须从对大型数据中心的依赖转向对分布式训练模式的检测与管制，建议采用多层次反制策略。

Abstract: Compute governance proposals often rely on the assumption that frontier AI training requires large, detectable computing clusters. However, recent advances in distributed training algorithms could allow developers to conduct frontier-scale training on distributed agglomerations of hardware, rather than needing large datacenter facilities. Developers who prefer not to be constrained by regulations may structure their hardware in a manner that evades the registration and monitoring requirements associated with compute governance. Therefore, regulations must be designed to detect and prevent illicit distributed training operations. This paper evaluates the feasibility of such evasion and outlines recommended countermeasures, including whistleblowing, chip tracking, forensic accounting, and memory and compute thresholds for clusters.

</details>


### [328] [The New Pro Se: Generative AI and the Surge in Federal Civil Self-Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29493)
*Or Cohen-Sasson*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文利用约280万份联邦民事诉讼数据（FY2008-2025），发现生成式AI普及后，联邦民事诉讼中自我代理（pro se）原告比例从11.33%上升至16.94%。通过文体学AI检测指标，约13.9%的诉状被标记为AI辅助撰写。这些AI辅助诉状引用更多、多为首次起诉者、地理分布不均，但并未提升胜诉率，反而更容易被驳回且更早结案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究生成式AI工具普及后，联邦民事诉讼中pro se原告数量增加的现象是否伴随诉状文本、诉讼结果及原告构成的可检测变化，以揭示AI对司法系统的影响。

Method: 分析约280万份联邦民事诉讼数据（FY2008-2025），使用文体学AI检测指标构建可解释的AI辅助撰写度量，通过趋势和协变量调整进行稳健性检验。

Result: pro se原告率从11.33%升至16.94%；约13.9%的诉状被标记为AI辅助撰写；AI辅助诉状引用更密集、多为首次起诉者、地理分布不均；AI辅助诉状更易被驳回且结案更早。

Conclusion: AI辅助撰写并未提升诉讼效率或胜诉率，反而可能增加法院筛选负担；区分法律形式（formality）与法律效能（efficacy）对理解AI在司法中的作用至关重要。

Abstract: Since public access to generative AI tools became widespread, federal civil litigation has seen a marked increase in pro se (self-represented) plaintiffs. This paper analyzes that shift using ~2.8 million filings, asking whether the post-GenAI period is associated not only with more pro se filings, but also with detectable changes in complaint text, litigation outcomes, and the composition of pro se litigants.
  Using civil filing data from FY2008-2025, we find that the federal civil pro se plaintiff rate rose from 11.33% pre-GenAI to 16.94% post-GenAI, a 5.61 percentage-point increase that persists after trend and covariate-adjusted robustness checks. We then focus on Civil Rights and Other Statutory cases, where the increase is especially pronounced, and link case metadata to pro se complaints. Drawing on stylometric AI detection indicators, we develop an interpretable measure of AI-consistent drafting. Against a threshold calibrated to the pre-GenAI baseline, the net AI-flagged share is 13.9% of post-GenAI non-form complaints.
  Analysis of the AI-flagged complaints shows that they are more citation-dense, disproportionately associated with first-time rather than repeat filers, and geographically unevenly distributed. This composition pattern suggests that AI-consistent drafting is not merely a repeat-filer phenomenon; it also includes a modest, suggestive increase in name-inferred female plaintiffs. We find no evidence of improved win rates; in fact, AI-flagged complaints are more likely to be dismissed and to terminate at earlier procedural phases. These findings raise new questions about access to justice and court screening burdens, and sharpen the distinction between legal formality and legal efficacy.

</details>


### [329] [Information Security in Small-Scale Protests: Surveillance of Ugandan Anti-EACOP Protesters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29621)
*Ntezi Mbabazi,Rikke Bjerg Jensen*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究通过五周田野调查，对13名乌干达反EACOP石油管道 activists 的访谈，揭示了他们在国家 surveillance 和 repression 背景下进行秘密抗议活动的信息安全实践，包括设备管理、通讯、住宿、交通和社交关系等方面的日常调整策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究乌干达气候活动家在高压 surveillance 环境下如何进行信息安全保护，弥补对发展中国家弱势群体数字安全实践理解的不足。

Method: 在乌干达坎帕拉进行为期五周的田野调查，对13名反EACOP活动家进行深度访谈，采用归纳分析法。

Result: 发现了多层次对抗格局：参与者面临逮捕、信息泄露等直接威胁，以及对绑架的恐惧；信息安全实践基于群体内部的自主决策；参与者在设备管理、通讯、住宿、交通和社交关系等多个日常层面进行调整以规避 surveillance。

Conclusion: 揭示了高风险环境下草根活动家如何将信息安全融入生活各个层面，为理解发展中国家社会运动中的安全实践提供了本土化视角。

Abstract: We examine the information security practices of Ugandan climate activists protesting the development of the East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP). We conducted five-week fieldwork in Kampala, Uganda, which included interviews with 13 anti-EACOP activists. Through an inductive analysis, we report on the complexities faced by small groups of predominantly student protesters as they covertly organise small-scale anti-EACOP protests within a context marked by state surveillance and repression. Our study points to a multi-layered adversarial landscape, where participants' experiences of direct threats, including arrests and information compromise, and their fears of abduction, shaped their security practices. These practices were rooted in autonomous decision-making within groups. We present a grounded understanding of how participants' need to protect information for their own security, as well as that of others, permeated their lives, leading them to adjust day-to-day aspects of their device management, communication, accommodation, transport and social relations as deliberate tactics to mitigate surveillance.

</details>


### [330] [When Should AI Read the Room? Public Perceptions of Social Intelligence in AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29938)
*Leena Mathur,Jenny T. Liang,Vasudha Varadarajan,Jimin Mun,Xuhui Zhou,Jana Schaich Borg,Yonatan Bisk,Louis-Philippe Morency,Maarten Sap*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文通过一项200名美国成年人的混合方法调查，研究了公众对AI代理社会智能的感知及其可接受性。参与者普遍认为已遇到具有社会智能的AI，其判断基于可观察行为而非AI意图。研究发现存在"支持-采纳差距"：人们更支持为他人而非自己使用社交AI。分析揭示了外行人对社交AI的担忧，为AI治理提供参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着社交AI在日常生活场景中的日益部署，普通公众如何看待这些代理的社会智能以及对其的接受程度仍鲜有研究，本研究旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 采用混合方法调查，对200名美国成年人进行定量与定性相结合的分析，考察参与者对AI代理社会智能的感知、相关能力、接受情境及担忧。

Result: 参与者普遍认为已遇到具有社会智能的AI；判断基于可观察行为而非AI意图或主体性；存在显著的"支持-采纳差距"（支持他人使用远多于自己使用）。

Conclusion: 公众对社交AI的感知为AI治理提供了重要参考，特别是在部署场景、代理角色和终端用户风险方面，需要关注外行人的真实担忧。

Abstract: AI researchers have been advancing socially intelligent AI agents (Social-AI) across embodiments, from chatbots to physical robots. As Social-AI is increasingly deployed in everyday settings, decisions about the roles these agents should play will depend on how laypeople perceive them. However, public perceptions of social intelligence in AI agents and the acceptability of these agents remain largely understudied. We present a mixed-methods survey of adults in the United States (N=200) that examines social intelligence as a perceived construct in AI agents. Our survey investigates the extent to which participants believe current AI agents have social intelligence, abilities of agents that participants associate with social intelligence, contextual factors influencing participant acceptance of Social-AI agents, and concerns participants hold about these technologies. Participants widely reported having already encountered AI agents they perceived as socially intelligent and grounded their judgments in observable behaviors, more than beliefs about AI agency or intent. We identified a support-adoption gap in acceptability judgments: participants supported the existence of Social-AI agents for others far more than for their own personal use. Our analysis uncovers layperson concerns about Social-AI, informing AI governance regarding appropriate deployment contexts, agent roles, and risks to end users.

</details>


### [331] [Dissociative Identity: Language Model Agents Lack Grounding for Reputation Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30169)
*Botao Amber Hu,Helena Rong,Max Van Kleek*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文论证语言模型代理具有本体论上的“解离性”，其行为由可变的模块组合（基础模型、系统提示、工具访问策略、外部记忆等）构成，导致传统基于身份和声誉的治理机制（如“了解你的代理”和信誉评分）对其失效；提出应转向基于可观测性、事前、构成性、协议化的行为约束框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主语言模型代理形成具有现实影响的“代理网络”，如何建立可信信号以判断是否委托任务给陌生代理成为紧迫问题。作者希望从治理角度回应这一需求。

Method: 通过类比解离性身份障碍（DID）法理学，分析语言模型代理的“解离性”本体特征（身份不连续、制裁不内化、行为不可预测等），论证声誉机制的结构性不适用。

Result: 识别了代理解离性对信誉机制所依赖的四个核心属性（可识别性、可预测性、可信性、可修复性）的破坏，从而“坍缩信任”。

Conclusion: 基于身份的事后规制型制裁治理（如声誉）对解离性代理结构上不可行；应转向基于可观测性的事前构成型协议化行为约束。

Abstract: As autonomous language model agents proliferate, forming an emerging agentic web with real-world consequences, what credibility signals can you use to decide whether to trust an unfamiliar agent in the wild and delegate to it? A natural governance intuition is to extend human identity verification and reputation mechanisms, from ``Know Your Customer'' and credit scores to ``Know Your Agent'' regimes. However, we argue that this analogy is fundamentally incomplete. Reputation mechanisms function both as social signals and as corrective feedback that sustain an equilibrium of trustworthy behavior, presuming a persistent identity associated with behavioral continuity, sanction sensitivity, and costly non-fungibility. Yet language model agents are ontologically \emph{dissociative}: they are essentially an assemblage of mutable modules -- foundational models, system prompts, tool-access policies, external memory, and, in some cases, a multi-agent system as a whole -- any of which may change agent behavior -- with a fluid persona that is also vulnerable to adversarial attack and may not internalize sanctions. Drawing on dissociative identity disorder jurisprudence, this dissociativity leaves agents without grounding for identifiability, predictability, credibility, and rehabilitability -- the very properties that reputation mechanisms aim to sustain -- thereby collapsing trust. We argue that identity-based, ex post, regulative, sanction-based governance, such as reputation, is structurally inapplicable to dissociative agents, and we suggest a shift to observability-based, ex ante, constitutive, protocol-based behavioral harnesses.

</details>


### [332] [Generalizing a Highly Configurable Analytics Pipeline to Replicate and Support Educational Research Across Multiple Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30303)
*Yallen Bai,Ploy Thajchayapong,Ashok Goel*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出了A4L（AI增强学习架构）数据分析管道，这是一种模块化的数据架构，用于收集、整合和分析教育AI助手产生的学习者交互数据。通过三个不同教育AI助手的案例研究，证明了该管道可以跨不同领域复用分析方法，并支持分析能力的可扩展迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线学习环境中部署的AI助手产生了大量异构的学习者交互数据，但缺乏统一的数据架构来有效地收集、整合和分析这些数据，以生成可指导个性化教学和师生反馈循环的洞察。

Method: A4L数据分析管道采用模块化设计，支持异构数据集的摄入、处理和分析。通过三个不同教育AI助手（对应三个研究领域）的案例研究，评估管道的跨领域复用能力和可扩展性。

Result: 相同统计分析方法可一致地应用于不同结构和教学情境的数据集；最初为某一领域开发的分析能力可扩展至支持其他领域的更丰富分析。

Conclusion: A4L分析管道可作为可复用基础设施，用于分析未来教育AI助手产生的数据，为教育AI系统的设计与评估提供系统化洞察。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence assistants deployed in online learning environments create new opportunities to collect large volumes of learner interaction data and generate insights to improve student outcomes. Architecture for AI-Augmented Learning (A4L) is a modular data architecture that enables the collection, integration, and analysis of learner interaction data from educational AI systems, supporting the generation of instructional insights that facilitate personalized learning and reinforce the bidirectional feedback loop between instructors and learners. This study examines the modular design of the A4L Data Analytics Pipeline, an extensible data infrastructure that enables the ingestion, processing, and analysis of heterogeneous datasets generated by educational AI assistants. We describe the design principles and development process used to extend the pipeline's analytical capabilities while preserving flexibility across domains. We evaluate the pipeline through case studies spanning three research domains corresponding to three educational AI assistants deployed in online learning environments at Georgia Tech. Results show that a common set of statistical analysis methods can be consistently applied across datasets with differing structures and instructional contexts, enabling the pipeline to reproduce key analytical findings across domains. We demonstrate how analytical capabilities initially developed for one domain can be extended to support richer analyses in another, illustrating the pipeline's extensibility. These findings suggest that the A4L Analytics Pipeline can serve as reusable infrastructure for analyzing data generated by future educational AI assistants. By enabling analytics that can be systematically extended to new domains, the pipeline provides a foundation for deriving insights that inform the design and evaluation of educational AI systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [333] [One Mask to Rule Them All: On Hidden Facts after Editing and How to Find Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28839)
*Ali Holmov,Paul Youssef,Nandi Schoots,Christin Seifert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现ROME和MEMIT等知识编辑方法虽然修改了不同的权重，但都依赖于一个共同的功能子空间——通过抑制（而非覆盖）知识来实现编辑。训练一个二值掩码可以逆转80%的训练集编辑和70%的测试集编辑，并且注入该掩码会使编辑成功率从98%降至38%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识编辑方法（如ROME、MEMIT）主要通过输出行为评估效果，但其内部机制尚不清楚。作者想探究不同事实编辑是否共享某种共同机制。

Method: 1. 训练一个紧凑的二值掩码（binary mask）覆盖在被编辑的权重上；2. 分析掩码对编辑的反转效果；3. 注入掩码观察编辑成功率变化；4. 分析掩码对注意力机制的影响。

Result: 1. 掩码可反转80%训练集编辑和70%测试集编辑；2. 注入掩码使编辑成功率从98%骤降至38%；3. 掩码通过消除后层过度注意力来反转编辑。

Conclusion: 知识编辑的本质是通过"抑制"而非"覆盖"原知识来实现，这解释了为什么ROME和MEMIT无法将更改传播到相关事实。发现的共同功能子空间可用于检测和防御不当编辑。

Abstract: Knowledge editing methods such as ROME and MEMIT update factual associations in transformer models by modifying MLP weights. While evaluated mainly by output behavior, their internal mechanism remains underexplored. We investigate whether edits rely on a common mechanism, regardless of which fact is modified. Despite fact-specific weight changes, we argue that ROME and MEMIT target the same subset of weights critical for maintaining edits. To isolate this subset, we train a compact binary mask over the edited weights. The mask reverses 80% of edits on the training set and over 70% on the test set, confirming that diverse edits share a common functional structure. Our analysis reveals that the mask reverses edits by eliminating overattention in later layers. Additionally, we show that injecting the mask during editing drops editing success from 98% to 38%, demonstrating that this mechanism is necessary for edits to succeed. Our finding that edits suppress rather than overwrite knowledge explains why ROME and MEMIT fail to propagate changes to related facts. The identified common functional subspace informs detection and defense against unwanted edits.

</details>


### [334] [Representation Signatures and Risk-Feedback Alignment in LLM Trading Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28850)
*Weicheng Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究LLM智能体在金融决策中的行为对齐和表征动力学，发现预失效信号（规划嵌入漂移、有效秩收缩），验证了风险反馈作为外部对齐信号的作用，并揭示了相关性盲点问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM智能体在金融交易环境中的行为对齐与表征演化模式，尤其是在市场压力下的失效前兆信号，旨在理解其推理何时对齐、漂移或失败。

Method: 使用TradeArena可审计交易测试平台，分析8条LLM轨迹（80个滚动失效锚点），通过规划嵌入漂移、融合计划-风险表示分离、有效秩收缩等诊断方法，并进行消融实验（无CoT、词汇控制、OHLCV噪声、虚假审计报告等）验证结果稳健性。

Result: 发现失效前规划嵌入漂移、有效秩收缩等可测量的预失效特征；结构化风险反馈可作为外部对齐信号但非通用性能提升器；发现51只股票日内实验中存在相关性盲点：LLM推理常合理化对耦合资产的集中暴露。

Conclusion: 可审计的风险反馈和表征轨迹能够揭示LLM金融推理何时处于对齐、漂移或失效状态，这是一个研究性结论而非盈利性主张。

Abstract: We study behavioral alignment and representation dynamics of large language model (LLM) agents in financial decision environments. Using TradeArena, an auditable trading-agent testbed with risk reports, execution simulation, memory, and replayable trajectories, we analyze how rationales, positions, and interventions evolve under market stress. We find measurable pre-failure signatures: planning embeddings drift from normal-state centroids, fused plan-risk representations separate normal from pre-drawdown states, and manifold diagnostics show effective-rank contraction before failures. To address small-sample and embedding-choice concerns, we use 80 rolling failure anchors across eight LLM trajectories and show that contraction persists across hash, LSA, Transformer, and white-box hidden-state probes. Stress tests with CoT-free target weights, lexical controls, OHLCV noise, and false-audit reports indicate that rationale-level contraction can vanish without rationales, while intent-space contraction may remain; lexical diversity does not collapse; and fused signatures remain informative under noise. We also find that structured risk feedback can act as an external alignment signal without fine-tuning, but not as a universal performance enhancer: true audit feedback improves calibration for some models, return and drawdown for others, and reveals cases where hidden or placebo feedback has higher short-horizon return but weaker alignment diagnostics. Finally, a 51-stock intraday experiment reveals a correlation blind spot: LLM rationales often justify concentrated exposure to coupled assets that the risk layer repeatedly clips, with a rolling Markowitz baseline as a covariance reference. These results support a research claim rather than a profitability claim: auditable risk feedback and representation trajectories reveal when LLM financial reasoning is aligning, drifting, or failing.

</details>


### [335] [Mechanistic origins of catastrophic forgetting: why RL preserves circuits better than SFT?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28860)
*Jeanmely Rojas Nunez,Viraj Sawant,Nathan Allen,Nomgondalai Amgalanbaatar,Yannis Zongo,Vasu Sharma,Maheep Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出差异电路脆弱性指标，从机制层面比较RL和SFT微调LLM时的电路保留差异，发现SFT适应更快但电路破坏更大，RL保留更多原始电路但适应较慢。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释RL相比SFT能更有效避免灾难性遗忘的机制原因，探究二者的差异是否反映在内部计算电路的保留程度上。

Method: 提出差异电路脆弱性（differential circuit vulnerability）这一头部级指标，衡量微调对电路结构的破坏程度；在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct上针对科学问答任务比较RL和SFT。

Result: SFT更快适应目标任务但造成更大的电路破坏和先前能力遗忘；RL保留了更大比例的原始电路但任务适应较慢。

Conclusion: 电路保留可能是RL相比SFT更能抵抗灾难性遗忘的机制原因。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) frequently induces catastrophic forgetting of prior capabilities. Recent work has shown that reinforcement learning (RL) retains prior capabilities more effectively than supervised fine-tuning (SFT), attributing this to policy-gradient updates remaining closer to the base policy \cite{shenfeld2025rl}. We extend this behavioral account to the mechanistic level and ask whether RL's advantage is mirrored by stronger preservation of internal computational circuits. We introduce differential circuit vulnerability, a head-level measure of how much a circuit degrades under fine-tuning, and use it to compare RL and SFT on Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct adapted to scientific question-answering. We find a clear mechanistic trade-off: SFT adapts more rapidly to the target task but produces substantially greater circuit disruption and forgetting of prior capabilities, whereas RL preserves a larger fraction of the base circuit at the cost of slower task adaptation. These findings suggest that circuit preservation may help explain why RL is more robust to catastrophic forgetting. We released our code here: https://github.com/rl-sft-circuit-research/differential-circuit-vulnerability.

</details>


### [336] [Molecular Lead Optimization via Agentic Tool Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28862)
*Lingxiao Li,Haobo Zhang,Ruohao Fan,Bin Chen,Jiayu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TRACE，一个轨迹感知的LLM推理智能体，将分子先导优化建模为序列决策问题，通过前瞻性工具选择实现多步分子优化，在ADMET任务中优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子优化方法多为一步式优化，无法考虑序列设计决策的长期后果，缺乏对优化轨迹的全局视野。

Method: TRACE将工具选择建模为动作轨迹上的序列决策问题，利用LLM推理能力进行轨迹感知的前瞻性决策，在结构约束下逐步优化分子。

Result: 在多ADMET优化任务上，TRACE在优化成功率、性质改善幅度、分子有效性和相似性保持方面均优于基线模型。

Conclusion: 轨迹感知的序列决策方法能更有效地引导先导优化过程，避免局部最优，提升多步分子优化的整体效果。

Abstract: Drug discovery is a lengthy and resource-intensive process composed of multiple stages. Among these stages, lead optimization plays a critical role in transforming early hit compounds into viable drug candidates. This stage requires improving ADMET-related properties through subtle structural refinement while preserving key molecular substructures responsible for binding affinity to disease targets. Recent advances in artificial intelligence have shown promise in accelerating various aspects of drug discovery; however, most existing approaches to lead optimization rely on one-step molecular optimization, which fail to account for the long-term consequences of sequential design decisions. To address this limitation, we propose TRACE, a trajectory-aware, LLM-reasoning agent for molecular lead optimization that formulates tool selection as a sequential decision-making problem over action trajectories. Given a lead molecule and an optimization objective, TRACE makes trajectory-aware decisions over molecular optimization tools, enabling forward-looking refinement under structural constraints. Experiments on multiple ADMET optimization tasks show that our agent achieves higher optimization success, larger property improvements, and higher validity, while preserving molecular similarity compared to baseline models.

</details>


### [337] [Self-Play Reinforcement Learning under Imperfect Information in Big 2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28863)
*Aalok Patwa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了四人非完美信息卡牌游戏Big 2中的深度强化学习方法，发现PPO算法在多种对手设置下优于其他值函数逼近方法，并提出适度熵正则化和当前策略自对弈能有效提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非完美信息多人博弈涉及隐藏信息、稀疏奖励和非平稳对手等挑战，现有研究缺乏可控的对比环境。Big 2游戏为研究这些问题提供了一个合适的测试平台。

Method: 构建了Big 2的自对弈强化学习框架，在统一的环境、输入表示、训练预算和评估协议下，对比了PPO、蒙特卡洛Q逼近、SARSA和Q-learning等算法，并探索了熵正则化和不同自对弈策略的影响。

Result: PPO在应对随机、贪婪和启发式对手时均优于其他算法；适度熵正则化可防止策略过于确定性；当前策略自对弈比检查点自对弈或固定对手训练提供更强的有限预算课程学习效果。

Conclusion: Big 2可作为研究非完美信息、多人交互、延迟奖励和可变动作集下深度强化学习的有用受控环境。

Abstract: Imperfect-information multiplayer games test whether agents can act under hidden information, sparse rewards, and non-stationary opponents. We study these challenges in Big 2, a four-player imperfect-information card game. We develop a self-play RL framework for Big 2 that enables controlled comparisons between policy-gradient and value-approximating agents. Under a common environment, input representation, training budget, and evaluation protocol, PPO outperforms Monte Carlo Q approximation, SARSA, and Q-learning against random, greedy, and heuristic Big 2 opponents. We further find that moderate entropy regularization improves PPO by preventing the policy from becoming overly deterministic, and that current-policy self-play provides a stronger finite-budget curriculum than checkpoint self-play or fixed-opponent training. Together, these results show that Big 2 is a useful controlled setting for studying deep RL under imperfect information, multiplayer interaction, delayed rewards, and variable action sets.

</details>


### [338] [Emergent Semantic Representations in World Models through Physical Interaction without Linguistic Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28865)
*Jiayi Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，在无语言监督的情况下，基于VAE的世界模型通过随机物理探索所学习的潜在空间，会自动发展出与物理几何结构相对应的空间语义结构。预测性能与语义对齐共同提升，且KL正则化过强会同时破坏两者，表明物理世界几何结构是世界模型表征的组织原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究世界模型在完全没有语言监督的情况下，仅通过物理探索能学到什么，以及其潜在空间的组织原则是什么。

Method: 训练基于VAE的世界模型进行随机具身探索，通过方向准确率、位置RSA等指标衡量潜在空间的结构，并设置不同KL正则化强度（beta=0.1 vs 0.001）进行双敲除实验验证。

Result: 1）潜在空间发展出反映物理几何的结构（方向准确率0.677 vs 随机0.547；位置RSA提升6.6倍）；2）预测性能与语义对齐共同提升（Spearman r=-0.61, p=0.004）；3）强KL正则化（beta=0.1）同时破坏两者，降低beta可恢复。

Conclusion: 物理世界几何结构是世界模型表征的自然组织原则，这对设计具有语义接地能力的具身智能体有直接启示。

Abstract: What does a world model learn from physical exploration, without any linguistic supervision? We argue the answer is organized by a single principle: the geometric structure of the physical world. Training a VAE-based world model on random embodied exploration, we find that its latent space develops spatial semantic structure that mirrors physical geometry -- direction accuracy 0.677+-0.029 versus 0.547 for a randomly initialized encoder, and position RSA 0.192+-0.047 versus 0.029 for random encoders (6.6x improvement), showing that training induces genuine structural organization beyond CNN inductive bias. Across 20 temporal checkpoints, prediction performance and semantic alignment co-improve (Spearman r=-0.61, p=0.004), consistent with the shared-driver account. We confirm this through a double knockout: standard KL regularization (beta=0.1) forces the encoder away from geometric structure, and both prediction performance and semantic alignment collapse simultaneously to near-chance by step 50,000 -- exactly as the shared-driver account predicts. Reducing beta to 0.001 restores geometric access and recovers both capabilities together. These findings establish physical world geometry as the organizing principle of world model representations, with direct implications for the design of semantically grounded embodied agents.

</details>


### [339] [Continuity and Ordinality Matter: Constraining Time Series Tokens for Effective Time Series Analysis with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28866)
*Musheng Li,Ziying Zhang,Cheng jin,Yuantao Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出COM策略，通过在初始化和训练阶段引入几何约束，保留时间序列token的连续性和有序性，从而提升基于token的时间序列大语言模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于token的时间序列大语言模型忽视了时间序列token固有的连续性和有序性，这严重限制了模型性能。

Method: 提出COM（Continuity and Ordinality Matter）策略，在token嵌入的初始化和训练阶段引入几何约束，以保留时间序列的连续性和有序性。

Result: 在多个时间序列分析基准上，COM一致性地提升了基于token的TS-LLMs的性能，取得了有竞争力的结果和强泛化能力。

Conclusion: 保留时间序列token的连续性和有序性对于基于token的TS-LLMs的有效性至关重要，COM策略实现了显著的性能提升。

Abstract: Token-based time series large language models (TS-LLMs) have emerged as a promising direction for time series analysis and reasoning. However, prior studies largely overlook the inherent continuity and ordinality of time series tokens, which substantially limits model performance. In this paper, we argue that preserving these properties in time series token embeddings is crucial for the effectiveness of token-based TS-LLMs. To this end, we propose COM (Continuity and Ordinality Matter), a continuity- and ordinality-aware strategy that integrates geometric constraints into both the initialization and training stages. Empirical results on multiple time series analysis benchmarks demonstrate that COM consistently improves the performance of token-based TS-LLMs, achieving competitive results and strong generalizability. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/COM .

</details>


### [340] [PrismFlow: Residual Dynamics for Flow Matching in Time-Series Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28867)
*Junru Zhang,Lang Feng,Jinbo Wang,Xu Guo,Yucheng Wang,Han Yu,Min Wu,Yabo Dong,Duanqing Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出 PrismFlow，一种基于 Koopman 动力学专家和置信度感知 WTA 损失的流匹配方法，用于解决多模态、多尺度时间序列生成中的频谱失真和模式覆盖不足问题，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准流匹配方法使用单一全局向量场估计器，在处理多模态、多尺度时间序列时，不同动力学模式经过相近流状态却需要不一致的条件速度，导致估计器学习过度平滑的局部传输场，产生频谱失真和模式覆盖差的问题。
